programme.title: 效廉出发吧！今天去哪玩
programme.desc: 这一趟到南投，威廉、小舜相揪到鱼池chill一下！威哥带着小舜一起到鱼池享受熟男行程，从绝美人气咖啡厅一路chill到底！甚至把五星料理搬上游艇，用全新视角畅游日月潭！两人逛伊达绍老街，一路遇粉丝老板热情招待，超美味总统鱼酥卷，不用进大餐厅就能吃的到！拳头大的高丽菜包让怕烫的威哥大口吃！鱼池这里竟然有媲美荷兰羊角村的美景？还有会跳舞的土地，让威廉差点深陷泥沼？！千万不要错过，更多精彩内容请锁定东森超视33频道周日晚间8点「效廉 出发吧！」。

programme.title: 发现大湾区

programme.desc: Liz and Chris have both enjoyed living near the ocean and want to provide their three kids with the same experience. However, they have different opinions on how much to spend to make this dream a reality.

programme.title: A View to Dine For
programme.desc: Host Michael Yo takes us around the world to a restaurant with a bird's eye view of Singapore, as diners feast on fresh seafood fifty-seven storeys above the city.
Instead of sticking to a single concept, these homes are decorated according to the owner's personal tastes. We'll showcase homes where you can see the ultimate expression of personal style.

programme.title: Murder At The Derby
programme.desc: Kara lands her dream job of working at a prestigious horse stable under the tutelage of Jennifer. As their relationship with develops, tensions grow with Jennifer's jealous brother, Stephen.

programme.title: Crowdsource Murder
programme.desc: Monica starts a crowdsource fund to pay for the hospital bills after her daughter is injured. But as a seemingly attractive and generous man donates more and more money, she begins to question his motives.
Excitement is in the air, but before the team can fully bask in the moment, fate calls them to action. To win their desired home, they must first conquer the ultimate challenge: the Empty Home Quiz!
Junho, who had chosen a ₩7,500-per-night room during their last Vietnam trip, is back as the lodging dokbakja for their Thailand adventure. With both excitement and anxiety, the Dokbakz follow Junho.

programme.title: Dallas: Arcadia
programme.desc: Derek and Chauncey take on a house that was abandoned by previous flippers! Left with holes in the roof, termite damage and a dilapidated porch this house pushes their skills, and budget, to the limit.
4 Michelin star chef and MasterChef judge Jean-Christophe Novelli sets the first Pressure Test of the season with his 1992 dessert 'Jack in the Box', which helped him secure his first Michelin star.

programme.title: Chrissie and Jamie
programme.desc: Chrissie and Jamie have an active outdoor lifestyle. They want a home where they can just wake up and jump in the water for a swim, and the home must be a place their three adult sons will want to visit.

programme.title: Meatloaf Wellington with Sorghum Mustard
programme.desc: Chef Deborah cooks a dish inspired by American meatloaf, blending the recipe with an English-style Wellington. She adds a Southern favourite, sorghum mustard, and prepares smothered potatoes.

programme.title: Turk-ish Leek Burgers & Peach Crumb Bars
programme.desc: Jake is inspired by two dishes he learned from his mother-in-law and grandmother. The first is a Turkish leek burger. For dessert, it's a variation of his grandmother's cake with peach crumb bars.

programme.title: Orlando: Sweetbriar
programme.desc: Team is back where it all began in the Jewel Oaks neighbourhood, where Duke and Keith first flipped a house together. Will they manage to restore this nightmare from the '60s as successfully as last time?

programme.title: Lucca Style Pesto Pasta or Trenette al Pesto
programme.desc: Rachael prepares a classic pesto sauce using fresh basil, roasted pistachios and pine nuts, combined with pecorino and Parmigiano cheeses. She then cooks it "Lucca Style", with potatoes and green beans.

Upon arriving in Pattaya, heavy rain pours down relentlessly. But the Dokbakz don't care. Rain or shine, they go all in. They head to a buggy car experience centre, where they can roam through nature.

programme.title: Single Black Female 2: Simone's Revenge
programme.desc: After escaping the murderous clutches of Simone, Monica is making a fresh start as the host of a primetime TV program. Simone, suffering from amnesia, sees Monica on TV, her memories come rushing back.

programme.title: Orlando: Sweetbriar
programme.desc: Team is back where it all began in the Jewel Oaks neighbourhood, where Duke and Keith first flipped a house together. Will they manage to restore this nightmare from the '60s as successfully as last time?

programme.title: 记住乡愁-片段展播
programme.desc: 以弘扬中华优秀传统文化为宗旨，以传统村落为载体，以生活化的故事为依托，以乡愁为情感基础，以优秀的传统文化为核心，展现传统村落的自然环境、人文景观、民风民俗、乡土之物、文化积淀等。

programme.title: 收视指南
programme.desc: 中国中央电视台中文国际频道（CCTV-4）是中央电视台唯一一个面向全球播出的中文频道。《收视指南》栏目专门介绍央视的播出内容。

programme.title: In California, USA
programme.desc: Episode 10: California, USA - Hosts Jimmy Smith and Doug Anderson learn the Fight Discipline of Kajukenbo and the Martial Art of Hands, Feet and Throws with Masters Charles Gaylord and Greg Harper.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Adrien Broner vs. Martin Rodriguez
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is Adrien Broner taking on Martin Rodriguez to determine the new WBO super featherweight world champion. With both fighters looking for their first major world championship, one left hook will bring about a new champion. Also on the card, action from multi-weight champion Paul Williams and Verno Phillips.

programme.title: Tokyo, Japan: Show 4
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. Show 4, from the Ryogoku Kokugikan Arena in Tokyo, Japan, features Kagayaki, Shodai, Enho and Daieisho.

programme.title: Kansas City Finals: Part 1
programme.desc: The top 30 competitors from the Kansas City Qualifier tackle the Kansas City Finals course, which includes such obstacles as the Salmon Ladder, Flying Shelf Grab, Body Prop and Invisible Ladder.

programme.title: FS MMA Tyler Jackson vs. Dmitri Samoilov
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! Dmitri Samoilov from Russia, fights Canada's Tyler Jackson. These two slug it out for fight fans and leave the judges in St. Petersburg baffled.

programme.title: WCCB Osleys Iglesias vs. Vladimir Shishkin
programme.desc: From the Montreal Casino in Canada, the undefeated IBO Super Middleweight Champion, Osleys Iglesias, looks to defend his title against top-ranked Vladimir Shishkin. The bout will also determine the mandatory challenger for the IBF World Championship in the division, currently held by Canelo Alvarez. Both fighters are ranked inside the top 5 according to several world rankings, with Iglesias ranked #3 and Shishkin #2 in the world by the IBF.

programme.title: 食尚玩家 疯狂总部
programme.desc: 节目设下最疯狂的任务，主持群将进行任务解锁，品尝在地美食。

programme.title: 11点热吵店
programme.desc: 《11点热吵店》透过年轻世代的角度，无论是两性、职场、人际、时事娱乐等，大谈他们最关心、最想发泄、最有意见的热门话题！

programme.title: Wagon Ride
programme.desc: Bluey can't wait to get to the monkey bars as Dad takes her and Bingo on a wagon ride to the park. But her patience is tested when Dad keeps stopping to chat with other grown-ups.

programme.title: Banana's Star Appeal
programme.desc: Banana superstar's show is stopped when Pea steals his peel. Supertato races against Evil Pea to get it back but trouble hits when a giant Banana statue collapses onto the stage.

programme.title: Betty's First Day
programme.desc: The Squirrels are having fun trying out games but are surprised to find out that Betty didn't always enjoy playing.

programme.title: The Choreography Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels meet Duggee's old dance crew and learn that he was kicked out because he couldn't stick to the choreography. The Squirrels are surprised because Duggee is such a good dancer!

programme.title: The Pet Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels meet a scruffelump in the woods, and despite Duggee's reservations, take him in. But they soon learn the responsibilities of taking care of a pet.

programme.title: White Cliffs of Dover, England
programme.desc: The Go Jetters race to save the White Cliffs of Dover when Glitch digs for classroom chalk

programme.title: Central Park, New York
programme.desc: Glitch visits Broadway, while the Go Jetters tackle a huge cloud of smog in Central Park.

programme.title: Bullet Train, Japan
programme.desc: All aboard for a high-speed adventure, as the Go Jetters visit Japan's Bullet Train.

programme.title: Marina's Mexican Enchiladas
programme.desc: Marina takes us to Mexico, cooking a traditional dish called enchiladas. She entertains her friends with some special guest musicians: a traditional mariachi band.

programme.title: Orangutans
programme.desc: Andy, Jen and Scout head off on a global adventure to the rainforests of Borneo in South-East Asia in search of an orangutan mother and her baby.

programme.title: Ship Parts Song
programme.desc: Captain Captain discovers that Sandy and Seaweed don't know any of the correct names for the parts of the ship, so she decides to teach them through a song!

programme.title: Sidney the Soldier
programme.desc: Krash wakes up and notices a toy that he has never seen before.

programme.title: Bingo
programme.desc: When Bluey has a playdate at Chloe's, Bingo must learn how to play by herself. But all the games she knows need more than one person! Luckily Dad has a problem that needs solving.

programme.title: Rug Island
programme.desc: On Bingo and Bluey's Rug Island, a pack of felt pens can be anything: bananas, campfires, even a snake. But Dad will need to embrace his inner kid if he wants to make it his home.

programme.title: Charades
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want everyone to play charades, but Muffin and Socks are too young to understand the rules and Nana must think quickly to keep the game on track.

programme.title: Super Sandcastle
programme.desc: Supertato and the Veggies have built a super sandcastle, but Evil Pea wants to storm it by firing her hordes of Mini Peas at it with her pea shooter.

programme.title: This Way, That Way
programme.desc: The Teletubbies go 'this way, that way' on a Tubby Car journey to the Hidey Hup. The Tubby Spinny goes 'this way, that way' too.

programme.title: Drum
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'drum' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure! We see and hear lots of drums - a marching drum, a dancing drum and of course a drumming drum!

programme.title: Rise of the Vacubots
programme.desc: Messy goes to OKIDO to find out why vacuum cleaners are so noisy and inadvertently releases a huge swarm of Vacubot 2000s across OKIDO City!

programme.title: Mojo Draws the Line
programme.desc: Mojo and Bo were supposed to paint fresh lines on the street. But when they get into a race with Tao, the paint goes in every direction, causing wild traffic chaos.

programme.title: Wild Girls
programme.desc: Coco wants to play Wild Girls with Indy, but Chloe wants her to play another game.

programme.title: Dragon
programme.desc: When Bluey needs some assistance drawing a dragon for a story she is working on, she asks her dad, Bandit, for help.

programme.title: The Cheerleading Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels find Duggee's cheerleader pompoms, so he shows them his old moves. Time to practice: Duggee at the chess board, the Squirrels as a squad. There's a big match ahead...

programme.title: The Metal Detector Badge
programme.desc: Roly needs a wee, but the door is locked and Duggee has mislaid the key. Not to worry, Duggee has his metal detector.

programme.title: Frog Song
programme.desc: It's fun on the counting train until Naughty Monkey starts to drive! Ethel makes a shape, Frog drops beats with a ribbit song, and Enid turns into anime to chase after a mouse.

programme.title: What's Hot?
programme.desc: Billy and the Sillies introduce a visit to chicken A&E, the Squirrels build a bug house, Norrie has her chance to shine, and the Penguins give facts about what's hot and what's not.

programme.title: Tomatina Festival, Buñol, Spain
programme.desc: The Go Jetters get caught up in Spain's Tomatina Festival. The Tomato Battle takes place every August in the town of Bunol, near to Valencia.

programme.title: Hide and Seek
programme.desc: It's time for a family game of hide and seek. Everyone hides, while Bluey counts to twenty, but will she be able to stay focused on the game and not get distracted by all her toys.

programme.title: Road Trip
programme.desc: Mum helps Bluey and Bingo find ways to entertain themselves on a family road trip, while Dad tries to stay ahead of the grey nomad convoy or risk camping near the toilets.

programme.title: Magic
programme.desc: Bluey teaches Bingo how to use magic so she can make Mum play with her, but she forgets to explain the most important rule: never use magic for cheekiness.

programme.title: Chest
programme.desc: Dad tries to teach Bluey how to play chess, but Mum thinks she is still too young. When Bingo joins in, the kids make up their own rules, but they still can't beat Dad.

programme.title: Andy and the Sea Urchins
programme.desc: Andy blasts off on an aquatic adventure to California to see how kelp forests in the wild deal with urchins. Along the way, he meets a fish called a garibaldi and some sea otters.

programme.title: Cats
programme.desc: Bella has fun pretending to be a cat - a Bella-Cat. Together with Lift, she visits Tincy the Spider in the Sing Song Forest, who sings a spider rhyme all about taily-waily animals!

programme.title: The Making Friends Badge
programme.desc: The squirrels are off for a Jamboree to make some new friends, play games and have a picnic. They meet another group of young animals with their very own version of Duggee but everything they do is different.

programme.title: The Camping Badge
programme.desc: Duggee and the squirrels are going camping and they hear a scary noise outside the tent!

programme.title: The Medicine Badge
programme.desc: Duggee's not very well, he's lost his voice. The Squirrels want to make him feel better. Duggee tries to tell them that he needs some water but the Squirrels don't quite understand, so they ask all the other animals for advice. Does anyone have the answer?

programme.title: Wolong Panda Reserve, China
programme.desc: The Go Jetters visit a nature reserve in China. But who's taking all the pandas' bamboo?

programme.title: Go Jet Academy: Compass Navigators
programme.desc: Can Kyan and Foz use new compass skills to navigate their way out of an academy maze?

programme.title: Laid Back Shane
programme.desc: Shane is having too much fun to stop and refuel. That is, until he runs out of coal and is stranded in the hot, red desert.

programme.title: Shallot Circus
programme.desc: The Shallots have discovered acrobatics and are inspired to put on a show.

programme.title: Paisley Sea
programme.desc: The duo think they are heading to the zoo, but the bus takes a surprising diversion.

programme.title: Leaves
programme.desc: There are leaves all over the place, Stanley tries to gather them up in his van with his leaf blower, but it is harder than he thought and fills Myrtle's house with them instead.

programme.title: Mermaid

programme.title: Rug Island

programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want a lick of each other's ice cream. But they are so focused on making sure each lick is fair, they don't notice their ice creams are melting.

programme.desc: In this episode, George meets Dawn, who is hoping to breathe new life into her 19th-century village shop and create a beautiful new family home for her and her sons.

programme.desc: George takes on a classic 1930s terraced home with a tiny kitchen and two mismatched fireplaces, and revisits a Victorian home that he previously helped renovate.

programme.desc: It's Dessert Day and judges Prue and Liam are expecting the bakers to produce the perfect finale to any meal, including unusual 'Franken-Desserts'.

programme.desc: Join us as we take a look at a world of different luxuries each week. In this episode we get to peek inside the world's most luxurious private jets.

programme.title: Donal Skehan: Home Cook (S1)

programme.title: Premier League 2025/26
programme.desc: Wolves have only lost one of their last five away league games against Leeds (W3 D1), though it was on their last visit in August 2022 (1-2).

programme.title: Premier League 2025/26
programme.desc: Newcastle are winless in their last seven Premier League games against Bournemouth, with five of those finishing level (L2).

programme.title: Premier League 2025/26
programme.desc: Everton have won just one of their last 14 Premier League home games against Liverpool, though 10 of those games have finished level (L3).

programme.title: Premier League 2025/26
programme.desc: Manchester City are unbeaten in their last 10 Premier League home games against Arsenal (W7 D3) since a 2-0 loss in January 2015 under Manuel Pellegrini.

programme.title: Premier League 2025/26
programme.desc: Aston Villa have lost just one of their last 13 league games against Sunderland (W6 D6), going down 3-1 at the Stadium of Light in January 2016.

programme.title: Premier League 2025/26
programme.desc: Tottenham are winless in their last three Premier League games against Brighton (D1 L2), having previously never gone more than once without a win against the Seagulls in the top-flight.

programme.title: Premier League 2025/26
programme.desc: Nottingham Forest have won just one of their last eight league games against Burnley (D5 L2), beating them 2-1 at Turf Moor in May 2024.

programme.title: Premier League 2025/26
programme.desc: Aston Villa have lost just one of their last 13 league games against Sunderland (W6 D6), going down 3-1 at the Stadium of Light in January 2016.

programme.title: PL Stories 2025/26
programme.desc: We step inside the world of Tijjani Reijnders, joining him at home with his family in Manchester as he reflects on his remarkable rise to the top of the game. From his early beginnings to the bright lights of Manchester City, Reijnders opens up about the pivotal moments that shaped his career, the challenges he’s overcome, and the ambitions that continue to drive him.

programme.title: The Big Interview 2025/26
programme.desc: Antoine Semenyo's journey to the Premier League has been anything but straightforward. Starting his career at Bristol City, he had loan spells at Bath City, Newport County and Sunderland. Then, in 2023, the Ghanaian winger moved to Bournemouth and has never looked back. With 30 goals in four seasons on the South Coast, Semenyo established himself as one of the brightest talents in the Premier League and, this season, made the move to Manchester City.

programme.title: Premier League 2025/26
programme.desc: Manchester City are unbeaten in their last 10 Premier League home games against Arsenal (W7 D3) since a 2-0 loss in January 2015 under Manuel Pellegrini.

programme.title: Premier League 2025/26
programme.desc: Everton have won just one of their last 14 Premier League home games against Liverpool, though 10 of those games have finished level (L3).

programme.title: Premier League 2025/26
programme.desc: Nottingham Forest have won just one of their last eight league games against Burnley (D5 L2), beating them 2-1 at Turf Moor in May 2024.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Keluarga Sebenernya Udah Tau Tapi Dia Belum Mau
programme.desc: Bagus (Mahdy Reza) is the son of a traditional dance studio owner, but he works under an ambitious boss named Nova. Bagus often finds himself turning to Nova whenever he faces financial struggles. However, his heart actually belongs to Risa, a beautiful girl who has just enrolled in his family's dance classes

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Sayangku Tidak Hanya Sekedar Viral, Minta Maaf, Kelar
programme.desc: Desperate to cancel an arranged marriage set by his grandfather (Willy Smit), Ferdi (Masaji Wijayanto) teams up with his intended bride, Lisa (Ika Dihardjo). Ferdi’s plan is to make himself look so unattractive and unbearable that his grandfather will be forced to call off the wedding himself.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Habis Gelap Terbitlah Yang Menyala
programme.desc: Indri (Shanice Margaretha) is a hardworking independent woman who sells traditional herbal medicine (jamu) on her old bicycle. One day, she accidentally crashes into Pras (Cakrawala Airawan), an executive rushing to an important meeting. Their paths cross again when a frustrated Indri finds Pras outside her house, unintentionally making a mess of her laundry.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Jodoh Itu, Ketuk Pintu Dulu! Jangan Main Bablas
programme.desc: While Cila’s (Ersya Aurelia) crispy fish skin (basreng) business is booming, her love life is a disaster-especially after being betrayed by her best friend. She meets Eril (Cakrawala Airawan), whose mother disapproves of his current girlfriend. Cila and Eril decide to form a business partnership with Eril as her fish supplier, united by their shared success and a common enemy named Roy.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: MINTA HATI DAPAT JANTUNG MINTA PEMBANTU DAPAT JODOH
programme.desc: Ajeng (Bunga Zainal) arrives in Jakarta and is picked up by Marvin (Fero Walandouw), the grandson of Oma Mina (Dini Vitri), her new employer who has just returned from abroad. Oma Mina lives with Toni (Fendy Chow), Marvin’s older brother. Ajeng works as a housemaid, taking care of Oma Mina, from feeding her to preparing her medicine. Marvin and Toni are surprised at how close Ajeng becomes with Oma Mina, as many previous maids quit because Oma Mina was strict and temperamental.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: LOE YANG LUV GUA YANG KEDER
programme.desc: Zeno’s (25) life shatters when he discovers that Masha, the woman he loves, is cheating on him with his own cousin, Panca. To make matters worse, Zeno learns that Panca is plotting to overthrow Zeno's father from his successful oil company to seize the director's chair for himself.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Neng Takoyaki Senyumnya Kok Gak Ada Di Menu
programme.desc: Bastian’s (Indra Evans) wedding comes to a screeching halt when Sita (Ina Marika), a humble takoyaki vendor, crashes the ceremony claiming to be his pregnant girlfriend. In reality, Sita was hired by Bastian himself to create a scandal and escape a marriage he never wanted.

programme.title: GURIH CINTA TELUR ASIN
programme.desc: Varrel (Dimaz Andrean) has been traumatized by salted eggs since childhood. After accidentally injuring Babeh Jali and ruining his daughter Kinara's (Yuki Kato) salted egg stock, Varrel is forced into a unique punishment: he must work for Kinara to learn the art-and the value-of the very food he fears the most.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Mas Mawar Adalah Maut
programme.desc: Tama (El Ryan) is a rose seller who had to drop out of medical school after his parents went bankrupt. His life changes when he rescues Sheina (Indah Nicole), a doctor and girlfriend of a famous celebrity, after she suffers from amnesia following a tragic accident. As Tama cares for her, a beautiful bond begins to form between the fallen student and the forgotten doctor

programme.title: Samudra Cinta

After accidentally injuring Babeh Jali and ruining his daughter Kinara's (Yuki Kato) salted egg stock, Varrel is forced into a unique punishment: he must work for Kinara to learn the art-and the value-of the very food he fears the most.

programme.title: 点金胜手
programme.desc: 金融大鳄卓彧(黄宗泽)为求利益不惜踩钢线耍手段，一直备受商业罪案调查科高度监视，卓彧沉迷金钱和权力游戏忽略家人和朋友，妻子和良师先后因他离世，他毫无悔意，反而变本加厉，大舅周辛勇(黄智贤)身为商业罪案调查科人员誓要将他绳之于法，上司何双怡(陈敏之)和下属资雅(徐子珊)协力找寻证据，辛勇对资雅本寄望甚殷，视她为入室弟子，但资雅却突然离职转投卓彧的公司，先取得卓彧第二任妻子方明瑜(胡定欣)的信心，继而帮助卓彧对付金融界女强人柴沛勋(江美仪)，资雅几乎左右大局，卓彧的雄心壮志似被吞噬，充满杀戮的金融战场上，胜负最后谁来定夺……

programme.title: 争霸
programme.desc: 春秋战国时代，各路诸侯各据一方。多少奇情，都在那个充满变数的处境里一一展示。范蠡(陈坤)、勾践(刘松仁)和夫差(马德钟)叁人之间长达二十多年的斗智斗力 ─ 侠骨丹心的范蠡、卧薪尝胆的勾践、一代枭雄的夫差、还有倾国倾城的大美人西施(郭羡妮)……_x000D__x000D_二千五百多年前的故事看似遥远，但当中主角那份对理想的坚持，不屈不朽的精神，可歌可泣的故事，传诵至今，仍为人津津乐道。

programme.title: 争霸
programme.desc: 春秋战国时代，各路诸侯各据一方。多少奇情，都在那个充满变数的处境里一一展示。范蠡(陈坤)、勾践(刘松仁)和夫差(马德钟)叁人之间长达二十多年的斗智斗力 ─ 侠骨丹心的范蠡、卧薪尝胆的勾践、一代枭雄的夫差、还有倾国倾城的大美人西施(郭羡妮)……_x000D__x000D_二千五百多年前的故事看似遥远，但当中主角那份对理想的坚持，不屈不朽的精神，可歌可泣的故事，传诵至今，仍为人津津乐道。

programme.title: 银楼金粉
programme.desc: 广东佛山第一大银楼『尚银楼』面临生意危机，大老爷尚铿(秦沛)为取得沈家借贷，不惜与正室赛小蝶(薛家燕)施计强逼二少爷尚鋆(伍卫国)与沈家千金沈咏彤(杨婉仪)成亲，令鋆的意中人程秀杏(伍咏薇)一怒之下嫁入尚家做叁姨太。鋆从此与铿反目成仇，远渡重洋，兄弟不相往还。直至老太爷大寿那天，鋆始肯回家，但小儿子突遭绑架，铿不愿交出赎金，令兄弟再起冲突，鋆决意分家。_x000D__x000D_另方面，自鋆回来后，一直被铿冷落的杏面对着二叔深感痛苦，又被诬告害至四姨太霏霏(胡定欣)小产，杏痛定思痛向尚家进行报复，利用鋆之余情，暗中撩弄尚家上下，又揭发近身丫环秋菊(杨思琦)原是铿与有夫之妇留下的孽种，连串打击令一代豪门声名狼藉，万劫不复......

programme.title: 锦绣良缘
programme.desc: 程家世代经营染布业，程父与元配早逝，程二太太上官丹凤﹝黄淑仪﹞一直当家作主，把家业打理得井井有条。_x000D__x000D_长子智盛﹝罗莽﹞性格戆直，娶得贤妻周梦娴﹝苏玉华﹞。次子智博﹝阮兆祥﹞为人急功近利，和锱铢必较的妻子薛小小﹝郭少芸﹞是对欢喜冤家。叁子智勇﹝郑中基﹞心地善良但只管吃喝玩乐，其妻郑艳﹝梅小惠﹞为人势利却爱夫心切。四子智轩博学多闻、温文尔雅，却要奉皇上圣旨跟率性不羁的吐蕃女子顿珠﹝文颂娴﹞成婚。智轩和顿珠性格迥异，时有争执，二人不但无夫妻之实，而且常常斗气，因而闹出不少笑话来。期间，智轩爱上女子周梦诗﹝邝文珣﹞，顿珠大方地从中撮合，智轩心存感激。及后梦诗移情别恋，智轩若有所失，顿珠从旁安慰，二人竟又渐生情愫。程家因得罪权贵而尽失祖业，智轩更因一个惊人的秘密而惹来杀身之祸……

programme.title: 点金胜手
programme.desc: 金融大鳄卓彧(黄宗泽)为求利益不惜踩钢线耍手段，一直备受商业罪案调查科高度监视，卓彧沉迷金钱和权力游戏忽略家人和朋友，妻子和良师先后因他离世，他毫无悔意，反而变本加厉，大舅周辛勇(黄智贤)身为商业罪案调查科人员誓要将他绳之于法，上司何双怡(陈敏之)和下属资雅(徐子珊)协力找寻证据，辛勇对资雅本寄望甚殷，视她为入室弟子，但资雅却突然离职转投卓彧的公司，先取得卓彧第二任妻子方明瑜(胡定欣)的信心，继而帮助卓彧对付金融界女强人柴沛勋(江美仪)，资雅几乎左右大局，卓彧的雄心壮志似被吞噬，充满杀戮的金融战场上，胜负最后谁来定夺……

programme.title: 点金胜手
programme.desc: 金融大鳄卓彧(黄宗泽)为求利益不惜踩钢线耍手段，一直备受商业罪案调查科高度监视，卓彧沉迷金钱和权力游戏忽略家人和朋友，妻子和良师先后因他离世，他毫无悔意，反而变本加厉，大舅周辛勇(黄智贤)身为商业罪案调查科人员誓要将他绳之于法，上司何双怡(陈敏之)和下属资雅(徐子珊)协力找寻证据，辛勇对资雅本寄望甚殷，视她为入室弟子，但资雅却突然离职转投卓彧的公司，先取得卓彧第二任妻子方明瑜(胡定欣)的信心，继而帮助卓彧对付金融界女强人柴沛勋(江美仪)，资雅几乎左右大局，卓彧的雄心壮志似被吞噬，充满杀戮的金融战场上，胜负最后谁来定夺……

programme.title: 争霸
programme.desc: 春秋战国时代，各路诸侯各据一方。多少奇情，都在那个充满变数的处境里一一展示。范蠡(陈坤)、勾践(刘松仁)和夫差(马德钟)叁人之间长达二十多年的斗智斗力 ─ 侠骨丹心的范蠡、卧薪尝胆的勾践、一代枭雄的夫差、还有倾国倾城的大美人西施(郭羡妮)……_x000D__x000D_二千五百多年前的故事看似遥远，但当中主角那份对理想的坚持，不屈不朽的精神，可歌可泣的故事，传诵至今，仍为人津津乐道。

programme.title: 争霸
programme.desc: 春秋战国时代，各路诸侯各据一方。多少奇情，都在那个充满变数的处境里一一展示。范蠡(陈坤)、勾践(刘松仁)和夫差(马德钟)叁人之间长达二十多年的斗智斗力 ─ 侠骨丹心的范蠡、卧薪尝胆的勾践、一代枭雄的夫差、还有倾国倾城的大美人西施(郭羡妮)……_x000D__x000D_二千五百多年前的故事看似遥远，但当中主角那份对理想的坚持，不屈不朽的精神，可歌可泣的故事，传诵至今，仍为人津津乐道。

programme.title: 银楼金粉
programme.desc: 广东佛山第一大银楼『尚银楼』面临生意危机，大老爷尚铿(秦沛)为取得沈家借贷，不惜与正室赛小蝶(薛家燕)施计强逼二少爷尚鋆(伍卫国)与沈家千金沈咏彤(杨婉仪)成亲，令鋆的意中人程秀杏(伍咏薇)一怒之下嫁入尚家做叁姨太。鋆从此与铿反目成仇，远渡重洋，兄弟不相往还。直至老太爷大寿那天，鋆始肯回家，但小儿子突遭绑架，铿不愿交出赎金，令兄弟再起冲突，鋆决意分家。_x000D__x000D_另方面，自鋆回来后，一直被铿冷落的杏面对着二叔深感痛苦，又被诬告害至四姨太霏霏(胡定欣)小产，杏痛定思痛向尚家进行报复，利用鋆之余情，暗中撩弄尚家上下，又揭发近身丫环秋菊(杨思琦)原是铿与有夫之妇留下的孽种，连串打击令一代豪门声名狼藉，万劫不复......

programme.title: 锦绣良缘
programme.desc: 程家世代经营染布业，程父与元配早逝，程二太太上官丹凤﹝黄淑仪﹞一直当家作主，把家业打理得井井有条。_x000D__x000D_长子智盛﹝罗莽﹞性格戆直，娶得贤妻周梦娴﹝苏玉华﹞。次子智博﹝阮兆祥﹞为人急功近利，和锱铢必较的妻子薛小小﹝郭少芸﹞是对欢喜冤家。叁子智勇﹝郑中基﹞心地善良但只管吃喝玩乐，其妻郑艳﹝梅小惠﹞为人势利却爱夫心切。四子智轩博学多闻、温文尔雅，却要奉皇上圣旨跟率性不羁的吐蕃女子顿珠﹝文颂娴﹞成婚。智轩和顿珠性格迥异，时有争执，二人不但无夫妻之实，而且常常斗气，因而闹出不少笑话来。期间，智轩爱上女子周梦诗﹝邝文珣﹞，顿珠大方地从中撮合，智轩心存感激。及后梦诗移情别恋，智轩若有所失，顿珠从旁安慰，二人竟又渐生情愫。程家因得罪权贵而尽失祖业，智轩更因一个惊人的秘密而惹来杀身之祸……

programme.desc: 春秋战国时代，各路诸侯各据一方。多少奇情，都在那个充满变数的处境里一一展示。范蠡(陈坤)、勾践(刘松仁)和夫差(马德钟)叁人之间长达二十多年的斗智斗力 ─ 侠骨丹心的范蠡、卧薪尝胆的勾践、一代枭雄的夫差、还有倾国倾城的大美人西施(郭羡妮)……_x000D__x000D_二千五百多年前的故事看似遥远，但当中主角那份对理想的坚持，不屈不朽的精神，可歌可泣的故事，传诵至今，仍为人津津乐道。

programme.title: 新同居关系
programme.desc: 文（郭晋安）、辉（吴镇宇）、华（关咏荷）、珊（袁洁莹）四人自小相识，感情融洽，珊、文、辉更分租一屋一起共住。_x000D__x000D_辉性格花弗，崇尚自由享乐，不甘受束缚，身边不断转换女伴；文与华为一对恋人，多年来文始终只有华这个女友，虽然常被损友怂恿偷欢猎艳，但文只会心动而没有实际行动。_x000D__x000D_文、辉一直视珊为男仔头，但珊却不知不觉地暗恋辉，二人关系在友谊与爱情之间纠缠不清。此际，文与华之感情又出现矛盾，面临分手。一时之间，辉、珊、文、华均陷于感情迷阵中，不知所惜！

programme.title: 公主嫁到
programme.desc: 刁蛮任性的昭阳公主(佘诗曼)为避嫁吐蕃急招驸马，一代金店掌舵人丁来喜(关菊英)主动送上门，因二儿子金多禄(陈豪)及叁儿子金多寿(黄浩然)均属单身，希望藉此解决金店面临的财困危机。兄弟情深，多禄为救家业，主动答应亲事。谁料公主过门后尽显骄横跋扈本色，要求金家上下向她行君臣之礼，金家至高的精神领袖金太夫人(李香琴)也难逃一劫，公主的心腹侍婢司徒银屏(陈法拉)更不可一世，尊卑不分，连官媒丁有维(马国明)也不放眼内；金家各人不甘受屈，合力反抗，但金家出名的大力丫环吴四德(钟嘉欣)却倒戈相向，与公主站在同一阵线。公主斗驸马，叁合叁离，各施各法，最后更闹上皇宫，要由太宗亲自平息风波……娶得皇帝女，当然想夫凭妻贵；但娶着这位野蛮公主，又岂能百忍成金？

programme.title: 法言人
programme.desc: 金秉信(马国明饰)本是法律系高材生，却因一次冤狱而决定开启法律行政人员之路。凭借八面玲珑的处事手腕，秉信逐渐建立「金师爷」的金漆招牌。金师爷任职的律师楼突然面临倒闭，他运用人脉化解危局，还获律师田佑家(林夏薇饰)、庾国栋(黄嘉乐饰)加盟共事，并与大状马玮雄(张颕康饰)组成新的法律界「最强CP」，解决各宗错综复杂的案件。及后，金师爷竟再度成为犯人栏内的被告，纵得叁位知心好友全力支持，庭上仍处下风。到底金师爷一方最终能否逆转官司，继续以法律发言，为公义发声？

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: 酒店风云
programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.title: 酒店风云
programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.desc: 金秉信(马国明饰)本是法律系高材生，却因一次冤狱而决定开启法律行政人员之路。凭借八面玲珑的处事手腕，秉信逐渐建立「金师爷」的金漆招牌。金师爷任职的律师楼突然面临倒闭，他运用人脉化解危局，还获律师田佑家(林夏薇饰)、庾国栋(黄嘉乐饰)加盟共事，并与大状马玮雄(张颕康饰)组成新的法律界「最强CP」，解决各宗错综复杂的案件。及后，金师爷竟再度成为犯人栏内的被告，纵得叁位知心好友全力支持，庭上仍处下风。到底金师爷一方最终能否逆转官司，继续以法律发言，为公义发声？

programme.title: 天命
programme.desc: 和珅(陈展鹏)相中皇子永琰(谭俊彦)为皇帝。乾隆驾崩后，嘉庆帝说服和珅儿子丰绅殷德(何广沛)以及心腹福长安(陈山聪)倒戈，意图歼灭和珅及其党羽。然而和珅早有对策，不但化解嘉庆攻击；更反客为主，揭出皇贵妃(李施嬅)秘密，令嘉庆腹背受敌！_x000D__x000D_和珅二夫人长媚(姚子羚)和红颜知己豆蔻(唐诗咏)亦分头行事，令嘉庆亲弟永璘(张颕康)与之反目成仇，而白莲教也在江湖上兴风作浪，令嘉庆陷入绝境。岂料天命难违……

programme.title: 酒店风云
programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.title: 酒店风云
programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.title: 新同居关系
programme.desc: 文（郭晋安）、辉（吴镇宇）、华（关咏荷）、珊（袁洁莹）四人自小相识，感情融洽，珊、文、辉更分租一屋一起共住。_x000D__x000D_辉性格花弗，崇尚自由享乐，不甘受束缚，身边不断转换女伴；文与华为一对恋人，多年来文始终只有华这个女友，虽然常被损友怂恿偷欢猎艳，但文只会心动而没有实际行动。_x000D__x000D_文、辉一直视珊为男仔头，但珊却不知不觉地暗恋辉，二人关系在友谊与爱情之间纠缠不清。此际，文与华之感情又出现矛盾，面临分手。一时之间，辉、珊、文、华均陷于感情迷阵中，不知所惜！

programme.title: 公主嫁到
programme.desc: 刁蛮任性的昭阳公主(佘诗曼)为避嫁吐蕃急招驸马，一代金店掌舵人丁来喜(关菊英)主动送上门，因二儿子金多禄(陈豪)及叁儿子金多寿(黄浩然)均属单身，希望藉此解决金店面临的财困危机。兄弟情深，多禄为救家业，主动答应亲事。谁料公主过门后尽显骄横跋扈本色，要求金家上下向她行君臣之礼，金家至高的精神领袖金太夫人(李香琴)也难逃一劫，公主的心腹侍婢司徒银屏(陈法拉)更不可一世，尊卑不分，连官媒丁有维(马国明)也不放眼内；金家各人不甘受屈，合力反抗，但金家出名的大力丫环吴四德(钟嘉欣)却倒戈相向，与公主站在同一阵线。公主斗驸马，叁合叁离，各施各法，最后更闹上皇宫，要由太宗亲自平息风波……娶得皇帝女，当然想夫凭妻贵；但娶着这位野蛮公主，又岂能百忍成金？

programme.title: 法言人
programme.desc: 金秉信(马国明饰)本是法律系高材生，却因一次冤狱而决定开启法律行政人员之路。凭借八面玲珑的处事手腕，秉信逐渐建立「金师爷」的金漆招牌。金师爷任职的律师楼突然面临倒闭，他运用人脉化解危局，还获律师田佑家(林夏薇饰)、庾国栋(黄嘉乐饰)加盟共事，并与大状马玮雄(张颕康饰)组成新的法律界「最强CP」，解决各宗错综复杂的案件。及后，金师爷竟再度成为犯人栏内的被告，纵得叁位知心好友全力支持，庭上仍处下风。到底金师爷一方最终能否逆转官司，继续以法律发言，为公义发声？

programme.desc: 酒店大亨王玉廷离世后，王家随即掀起一场争产战，叁子启杰(吴卓羲)离家出走，杰母遭两位同父异母的兄长迫走。更甚者，杰此时发现父亲早已将名下酒店股份转给了一个名叫高峰(马德钟)的人！_x000D__x000D_ 原来峰是为报仇而来，誓要将酒店得到手。危城告急，叁兄弟将个人恩怨放下，更不惜拉拢对王家产业一直虎视眈眈的舅父郑永发(姜大伟)连手对付峰。惟峰为人心狠手辣，众人被逐一打垮。_x000D__x000D_ 峰在王氏集团的地位稳如泰山之际，赫然发现女友顾碧琦(郭可盈)走近自己原来别有用心……

programme.title: 法言人
programme.desc: 金秉信(马国明饰)本是法律系高材生，却因一次冤狱而决定开启法律行政人员之路。凭借八面玲珑的处事手腕，秉信逐渐建立「金师爷」的金漆招牌。金师爷任职的律师楼突然面临倒闭，他运用人脉化解危局，还获律师田佑家(林夏薇饰)、庾国栋(黄嘉乐饰)加盟共事，并与大状马玮雄(张颕康饰)组成新的法律界「最强CP」，解决各宗错综复杂的案件。及后，金师爷竟再度成为犯人栏内的被告，纵得叁位知心好友全力支持，庭上仍处下风。到底金师爷一方最终能否逆转官司，继续以法律发言，为公义发声？

programme.desc: Tess gives the day off to a sleep-deprived Sunny before getting pulled into a nail-biting 911 call with an injured man locked in a steel drum who has no idea where... or who he is! programme.title: Split TV Series
programme.desc: Maryam akan berkahwin dengan Mikael . Maryam tidak mengetahui Mikael menghidap Dissociative Identity Disorder, satu jasad tujuh personality berbeza di dalamnya.

programme.title: Eropah, Here I Am
programme.desc: Bukhary membawa diri ke Pulau Leros, Greece dan menjadi sukarelawan membantu pelarian Syiria. Di situ dia mempelajari nilai kehidupan dan kemanusiaan.

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第二十二集 女人呀 周慕孙精心铺垫，他给罗曼约了投资人，很自然一起吃饭。饭后，又见卖荷花的人，也想起上次电影看一半。周慕孙顺理成章带罗曼回家，借着电影坦诚自己从小颠沛流离，床上有人就睡不好，句句吐露余情未了，忽然陈凯西打来电话。罗曼恨铁不成钢吵起来，也没心思再跟周慕孙腻歪。周慕孙安抚她别再掺和别人夫妻家务事，说着给她戴上一条项链。

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第二十三集 嘿，女人 离婚协议赫然显现，陈勉笑问，陈凯西又是唱哪出？陈凯西回他。想给自己赎身？陈勉轰的一声懂了，钟倾城跟他约饭聊天是为了套行踪定位，那天在景山笑着跟他说电影台词，原来是把他当猎物耍？陈凯西要他的股份和跳跳的抚养权，现在签字，否则，罗曼就会用周慕孙的手机，把陈勉和张凡的股权转发到朋友圈，上市将化为泡影。

programme.title: 偶像疯子
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了资深铁杆粉丝出身的明星律师孟世娜（崔秀英饰），为了被诬陷为杀人嫌疑人的偶像都来益（金宰永饰）进行辩护，并由此展开的一系列故事。

programme.title: 陪玩的女人
programme.desc: 剧情讲述清洗了黑暗过去的大哥至焕（严泰九饰）和陪孩子们玩的米妮姐姐（韩善伙饰）银河之间满是反转和心动的爱情故事。

programme.title: 善良的女人夫世彌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕]一个保镖为了避开老板的敌人，藏身在乡村当幼儿园老师却意外遇上了新的挑战：一个心存怀疑的草莓农夫！

programme.title: 山河枕
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】大将军之女楚瑜（宋茜饰）因家族蒙冤，以卫家长嫂身份与卫家幼子卫韫（丁禹兮饰）共同追查七万将士战死真相，二人在抵御北狄入侵、揭露皇室阴谋的过程中渐生情愫，同时守护家国安宁。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 守诚者
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 全港警民全力守城 何浩辉带警员去找周雄，路上给邵峰打电话汇报情况。全球金融峰会现场的刘先生得知炸弹之事，告诉阮sir港府绝无可能向周雄妥协，阮sir表示已经安排警力，守备在会场的部分警力也调动过去，刘先生指示一定要在股市开市前拆除炸弹。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 叶景清临终前将保护白露的使命交给了翼无忧，希望他前往天启守护白露。白露在天启努力寻找合适的吉址，最终选定了一个既不劳民又不伤财的位置，并得到了彧修明的认可。然而，这一举动引起了界海天和樊如晦的不满。另一方面，七海伶为了拯救夜北族民，心生杀彧修明的想法，并暗中联合他人计划行动。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 生活在別处的我
programme.desc: 普通女孩夏果（钟楚曦饰）面临一个艰难的抉择，她会选择和男友在家乡过安稳温馨的生活，还是抓住机会在大城市追求事业成功？

programme.title: 生活在別处的我
programme.desc: 普通女孩夏果（钟楚曦饰）面临一个艰难的抉择，她会选择和男友在家乡过安稳温馨的生活，还是抓住机会在大城市追求事业成功？

programme.title: 山河枕
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】大将军之女楚瑜（宋茜饰）因家族蒙冤，以卫家长嫂身份与卫家幼子卫韫（丁禹兮饰）共同追查七万将士战死真相，二人在抵御北狄入侵、揭露皇室阴谋的过程中渐生情愫，同时守护家国安宁。

programme.title: 巾帼枭雄之悬崖
programme.desc: 桂婵知悉所有真相后，四海欲杀人灭口，危急关头十七赶至……桂婵送十七赴香港开始新生活，而自己则因身体状况，永远放弃做第二次手术。十七在香港与韦豪、花香等人团聚，原来众人在奕澄提供的居所住下来。韦豪和花香打算在港重开桂香楼，十七亦乐意注资，自己则四处找寻工作。十七终于找到一位赏识他的老板，成为投资部经理。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 山河枕
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】大将军之女楚瑜（宋茜饰）因家族蒙冤，以卫家长嫂身份与卫家幼子卫韫（丁禹兮饰）共同追查七万将士战死真相，二人在抵御北狄入侵、揭露皇室阴谋的过程中渐生情愫，同时守护家国安宁。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】明塱医院心胸外科顾问医生董一妍，完成了难度极高的手术，为医院奠定国际地位。此时，集团主席王进涛正身在欧洲古堡，为迎娶一妍作准备。进涛的长子王启智、二子王启聪均是继任主席的人选，两人都认为一妍是他们的威胁。启智的妻子陈丽雪是明塱慈善基金会主席，启聪的妻子文以珈则是正义律师。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 彧修明在朝上设立九州并下令斩杀反对的界海天。七海伶和界诸婴得知消息后十分悲痛。同时，白露在监督星瀚大典时发现贪官阴谋，并找到旧时相识顾惘然帮助揭露。界诸婴回到天启，试图领回父母遗体，但彧修明避而不见。白露查到樊征的贪污证据并告知彧修明，此时樊如晦等人正在密谋黑曜石的事情。

programme.desc: 彧修明在朝上设立九州并下令斩杀反对的界海天。七海伶和界诸婴得知消息后十分悲痛。同时，白露在监督星瀚大典时发现贪官阴谋，并找到旧时相识顾惘然帮助揭露。界诸婴回到天启，试图领回父母遗体，但彧修明避而不见。白露查到樊征的贪污证据并告知彧修明，此时樊如晦等人正在密谋黑曜石的事情。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 生活在別处的我
programme.desc: 普通女孩夏果（钟楚曦饰）面临一个艰难的抉择，她会选择和男友在家乡过安稳温馨的生活，还是抓住机会在大城市追求事业成功？

programme.title: 生活在別处的我
programme.desc: 普通女孩夏果（钟楚曦饰）面临一个艰难的抉择，她会选择和男友在家乡过安稳温馨的生活，还是抓住机会在大城市追求事业成功？

programme.title: 山河枕
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】大将军之女楚瑜（宋茜饰）因家族蒙冤，以卫家长嫂身份与卫家幼子卫韫（丁禹兮饰）共同追查七万将士战死真相，二人在抵御北狄入侵、揭露皇室阴谋的过程中渐生情愫，同时守护家国安宁。

programme.title: 巾帼枭雄之悬崖
programme.desc: 十七在香港不得志，终日自暴自弃，桂婵来港探望十七，鼓励他重新振作。战事爆发，十七和奕澄赶赴上海劝桂婵来港，桂婵为守护银行不肯离开，十七和奕澄无奈离去。奕澄突然向十七表白，并坦白出国读书是为了忘记一见钟情的那一秒钟。韦豪和花香终成眷属；此时传来日本军打到上海的消息，令十七极为担忧。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】一妍将王家私人飞机坠毁的消息压下；王家三女王启澄与其丈夫彭建邦，暗通进涛的死敌柯永成，要令明塱医院停摆。以珈与丽雪质问下，一妍终讲出所知；一妍答应让两人到当地参与搜救，她则留港善后，但一切要保密……一妍安排专机让坠机生还者进涛回港就医，越洋吩咐副院长林英杰紧急安排，同时暗中跟记者交易……

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 白露去见七海伶，得知七海伶等人计划刺杀彧修明。同时，白露被任命为负责星瀚大典的事宜，并举荐顾惘然协助。另一方面，界诸婴在父亲界海天的遗书劝导下，放下仇恨。蔡骖和樊如晦等人则密谋利用七海伶刺杀彧修明，计划夺位。白露在调查彧修明的秘密时，被发现但她成功以仰慕彧修明为借口掩饰过去，并借到书带回研究，发现真师的记载，开始怀疑彧修明与真师有关。

programme.desc: SpongeBob gets in over his head when he volunteers to babysit Sandy's 3 nieces. // SpongeBob and Patrick volunteer as guards at the museum, while Squidward attempts to hang his painting unnoticed.

programme.title: Salsa Imbecilicus
programme.desc: When a freak accident causes everyone in town to become as stupid as Patrick, Sandy must save the day.

programme.title: Cruel Summer
programme.desc: Max and Phoebe are working well as a team, until he is accused of committing crimes and Phoebe must apprehend him. Now on the lam, Max learns that the Mastermind's henchman is secretly controlling his actions via a chip in his neck.

programme.title: A Danger Among Us
programme.desc: After Miles has a vision that Rick Twitler is still around, Danger Force travels deep into the Man's Nest's to find him, running into an old foe along the way.

programme.title: Cave the Date
programme.desc: Henry and the gang set up a secret underground restaurant in the Man Cave for Charlotte's private dinner with music superstar Jack Swagger. When word gets out that Jack Swagger is in town, some unwanted guests crash the party.

programme.title: Tripped!
programme.desc: Everyone in the family has been working hard to save up for a family vacation. But while road tripping to their destination, everything that can go for the family wrong does.

programme.title: Meet the Purrents / Apartment Complex
programme.desc: When Lori and Bobby find a kitten, they decide to coparent and swap the kitten back and forth between their homes. // After telling her family how great her apartment is, Lori unknowingly entices her sisters to secretly take over her space.

programme.title: The Last Laugh
programme.desc: Luan thinks Mr. Coconuts is out for revenge when she replaces him with Lola in her act.

programme.title: Hot Crossed Nuts / Sir Urchin and Snail Fail
programme.desc: Sandy's homemade snack becomes a big hit at the Krusty Krab. // SpongeBob and Patrick's favorite comedy duo has a falling out on live television.

programme.title: Friendiversary / Mandatory Music
programme.desc: SpongeBob celebrates the anniversary of his friendship with Squidward. Squidward does not. // Squidward's lack of talent lands him in a court ordered music class.

programme.title: Big League Bob
programme.desc: SpongeBob is recruited to cook in the big leagues, but first, he must prove his worth in the test kitchen.

programme.title: Jade the Influencer / Restaurant Review
programme.desc: Bibi goes live, but when she's not getting enough likes Twister steps in to help, and is almost unmasked. // Gran Gran's convinced the Chahuta and won't impress a food critic, so tries to change things.

programme.title: Too Many Patricks / Much Tofu About Nothing
programme.desc: Patrick hires other Patricks to entertain at parties. // Pat-Thos shares a Hamdonian tale of love and pork products.

programme.title: Chopping Spree
programme.desc: Pat The Hapless goes on a barbaric quest to the shopping mall.

programme.title: Let's Break A Deal / A Dish Come True
programme.desc: Rusty strikes a deal with Morpheus that for a seemingly small price, Morpheus will cast spells for him. // Lincoln starts to work at Dad's restaurant when he hears that the best employee wins a dish named in their honor.

programme.title: Riddle School / Love Me Tenor
programme.desc: The Action News team springs into action to figure out who is behind a mysterious string of pranks. // When Lincoln and friends discover Gus has a hidden talent, they work together to help him live out his dream.

programme.title: No Such Luck / Frog Wild
programme.desc: The sisters think Lincoln is bad luck so they ban him from attending their activities. // When Lincoln finds out his class is dissecting frogs, he and Lana embark on a mission to rescue them.

programme.title: Steeling Thunder / Be Careful What you Fish For
programme.desc: To win their school film festival, Lincoln and Clyde cast Lynn as their movie's extreme stunt double. // A fishing trip with Gramps turns into an obsessive chase when Gramps' old fish rival, Moby Rick, swims nearby.

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.desc: Lily and Jack are half-siblings thrown together for a summer who must learn how to navigate their new family dynamic while also helping with the Wylde Pak family's chaotic pet grooming business.

programme.title: Halmoni Learns the Internet
programme.desc: Halmoni feels she looks helpless about technology, so she becomes a master hacker and vows to destroy their internet FOREVER!

programme.title: Putting Up with the Plovers
programme.desc: When Will accidentally befriends an annoying man, his sorry attempts at a break-up make things painfully awkward for the whole family.

programme.title: Sharks vs. Pods / CopyBob DittoPants
programme.desc: The Sharks' are the toughest guys in town, but their next confrontation might be too much for SpongeBob to handle. // Plankton clones SpongeBob in an effort to steal Krabs' secret formula, but original Bob might ruin his plans.

programme.title: The Krusty Bucket
programme.desc: Plankton creates a clone of himself and Mr. Krabs, but neither restaurant is safe from the newcomer.

programme.title: Houbi Houba Heist / Twister's Treehouse
programme.desc: Mica's Marsup journal ends up in Acu's bag so he has to get it back before his friend finds it. // Twister, is fed up of Hope and Punch's pranks, so he builds his own cardboard house which Stan finds.

programme.title: The Mad Scientist / Missed Connection
programme.desc: Lisa gets invited to work at an institute and get away from her crazy family. // Lori and Bobby worry that dating long-distance is causing them to lose their connection.

programme.title: Prom-Com / Scene Steeler
programme.desc: When Leni is put in charge of the school's prom, she is determined to make it the most memorable night ever. // Lincoln and Clyde cast Luan as the villain, Bee Trayal, in their David Steele film and have to deal with her method acting.

programme.title: Predict Ability
programme.desc: After discovering he has rituals, Lincoln worries he's predictable and vows to change it up.

programme.title: Best Summer Ever! Part 1 / Best Summer Ever! Part 2
programme.desc: The family throws Jack a goodbye party, but he only cares about impressing his mom if she comes to Canyon Valley. // The end of the summer has arrived and the kids go on a wild adventure to get Jack to the airport on time.

programme.title: From Dust Till Dawn
programme.desc: Chloe is struggling with her leadership skills, but when a villain attacks her school field trip, Max and Phoebe have to put Chloe in charge while they try to take down the villain and defuse his dangerous astronomical weapon.

programme.title: Double Date Danger
programme.desc: When Miss Shapen's niece, Noelle, comes into town and chooses Jasper over Henry, Henry discovers that Noelle has much bigger plans than just going out to dinner with Jasper.

programme.title: iThink They Kissed
programme.desc: When Sam accidentally reveals to Carly that she and Freddie shared a secret kiss, Carly confronts them both about why they never told her about it. Meanwhile, Spencer goes to prison to teach an art class to convicts.

programme.title: The Great Ping-Pong Scam
programme.desc: Tori discovers that her friends have been secretly going to a fancy restaurant instead of playing in an annual ping pong tournament.

programme.title: Beastie Pie
programme.desc: Marky's favorite social media influencer Beastie Pie, is hosting a gross food-eating competition at BoomBox Burger. When Sadie and Lay Lay overhear Beastie plans to rig the contest, they must work together to convince Marky that Beastie is a fraud.

programme.title: Sound of Silence / Space Invader
programme.desc: Lincoln buys a pair sound-canceling ear buds to drown out the sound of his sisters. // After Lynn and Lucy get in a fight, Lincoln agrees to let Lynn bunk in his room but only for a night!

programme.title: Picture Perfect / Undie Pressure
programme.desc: Lincoln plots to take the 'perfect' family photo for his parents' anniversary gift. // Lincoln and his sisters bet on who can go the longest without doing their most annoying habits.

programme.title: Basic Zipper Merging Etiquette / How to Bag a Beast
programme.desc: The family gets stuck in a traffic jam that leads to all human civility getting thrown out the passenger side window. // Jack and Lily attempt to catch a legendary town fish despite horror stories from townsfolk who have tried and failed before them.

programme.title: Blood Is Thicker Than Grease / Don't Make Me Laugh
programme.desc: Plankton's family open their own restaurant...directly next to the Chum Bucket. // SpongeBob suddenly finds everything funny...much to everyone's annoyance.

programme.title: The Fun Bucket / The Patrick Show After Dark
programme.desc: The Stars celebrate Patrick's birthday at the Chum Bucket. // Patrick and Squidina explore Bikini Bottom late at night.

programme.title: Pat-a-thon
programme.desc: Patrick hosts a telethon to raise money for snails who can't dance.

programme.title: Flip This Flip / Haunted House Call
programme.desc: The Loud kids help Flip clean up his image to impress his middle school crush. // When the Mortician's Club can't afford tickets to Casket Con, they decide to start a business to raise money.

programme.title: Steeling Thunder / Be Careful What you Fish For
programme.desc: To win their school film festival, Lincoln and Clyde cast Lynn as their movie's extreme stunt double. // A fishing trip with Gramps turns into an obsessive chase when Gramps' old fish rival, Moby Rick, swims nearby.

programme.title: Best Summer Ever! Part 1 / Best Summer Ever! Part 2
programme.desc: The family throws Jack a goodbye party, but he only cares about impressing his mom if she comes to Canyon Valley. // The end of the summer has arrived and the kids go on a wild adventure to get Jack to the airport on time.

programme.title: Sad, Single, and Stranded / A Waste of a Perfect Summer Day
programme.desc: Will & Min show Jack around to help him find a good story. Lily spills boba in Jack's suitcase and tries to hide the evidence. // Jack tries to find "the big picture" as Lily shows him how to spend a perfect summer day in Canyon Valley.

programme.title: Squid Plus One / The Executive Treatment
programme.desc: After receiving an invitation to a gallery opening, Squidward scrambles to find a friend to take with him. // While trying to order a special sandwich, Patrick gets swept up in the fast paced world of business.

programme.title: Jade the Juggler / Parcel Chase
programme.desc: Jade tries to help too many people and ends up causing chaos in the process! // The Twins ask the Marsupilamis to wait for an important parcel, but they miss it, so try and retrieve it from the depot.

programme.title: Cow Pie Kid
programme.desc: Lynn pushes Liam to his limits when he becomes the star pitcher for the middle school baseball team.

programme.title: The Return of Superman
programme.desc: Witness the parenting challenges of "Superman", the first hero that children encounter when they are born.

programme.title: My Neighbor, Charles
programme.desc: Foreigners, leaving their homelands behind, have come all the way to a new country, South Korea, for reasons such as work, study or even marriage. The real stories of foreigners who challenge themselves to survive in Korean society are unfolded!

programme.title: Recipe for Love
programme.desc: In the rapidly developing town of Onjeong, two rival medical families - one modern and one traditional - wage a neighbourhood feud fuelled by a long-standing grudge. This drama follows their chaotic journey as they unravel decades of misunderstanding to find healing and love.

programme.title: Young Lady and Gentleman
programme.desc: To Dandan, her family is an obstacle. She eventually leaves home and starts working as a resident tutor. The more time she spends with the kids and their father Youngguk, the more she falls for him.

programme.title: STAND UP COMEDY ACADEMY 4
programme.desc: Stand Up Comedy Academy (Season 4) is the fourth installment of the popular comedian talent search competition aired on Indosiar. This season features a refreshed lineup of hosts, bringing together the dynamic chemistry of Ayu Dewi, Gilang Dirga, Arie Kriting, Andhika Pratama, and Uus to lead the hunt for Indonesia’s next comedy star.

programme.title: Cantik Cantik Kiyut Tapi Bikin Hati Hanyut
programme.desc: Anna (Soraya Rasyid), a beautiful architect who is assigned to work on the construction of a bridge in the village with a foreman named Zaenal (Ridho Ilahi). But how can they work together, from the moment they meet, Anna and Zaenal keep fighting.

programme.title: HOT SHOT
programme.desc: Program infotainment yang membahas kehidupan selebriti secara mendalam.

programme.title: JALAN - JALAN S2
programme.desc: A program that provides information about interesting places for vacations.

programme.title: UNGKAP HIKMAH DI BALIK DOSA
programme.desc: Revealing the Wisdom Behind Sin is a project that assesses events or incidents from an Islamic perspective, revealing the wisdom behind sin.

programme.title: Terbakar Api Cemburu
programme.desc: Returning early from a business trip, Evan brings a lavish bouquet of flowers to surprise his wife, Anna, on their wedding anniversary. But the surprise is on him: he catches Anna red-handed with her ex-lover, Arman. A fierce and tense brawl breaks out between the two men, leaving Anna hysterical as she desperately tries to stop the violence.

programme.title: THE SULTAN
programme.desc: The Sultan Empire is a grand talk show featuring 'King Sultan' Andre Taulany and 'Prince' Raffi Ahmad, accompanied by a hilarious squad of royal guards. With spectacular guest stars and non-stop entertainment, this is one regal spectacle you definitely don't want to miss!

programme.title: JALAN - JALAN S2
programme.desc: A program that provides information about interesting places for vacations.

programme.title: JUARA INDONESIA RAMADHAN
programme.desc: "Juara Indonesia Ramadan" is a quiz show testing knowledge and agility in answering questions quickly and accurately.

programme.title: Jangan Ambil Bayiku
programme.desc: Eliana’s lavish wedding is the talk of the town, but behind her smile, she is heartbroken. While her parents beam with pride before their guests, Eliana knows the truth: her marriage is nothing more than a cold business deal made between her parents and her mother's old friend, Rosita.

programme.title: Cantik Cantik Serigala
programme.desc: Raffi attaches the key to the keyhole of the lock in the painting, suddenly the head of the key seems to be pulled in, Raffi then turns the key, the cage door looks open and the wolf in the cage immediately jumps out and makes Raffi shocked and falls backwards. Raffi ran up and down until he fell into the ravine after his foot caught a tree root.

programme.title: INDONESIA FOOD ADVENTURE
programme.desc: Discover the rich and diverse flavors of Indonesian cuisine - from traditional dishes and street food to heartwarming homemade meals.

programme.title: JALAN - JALAN S2
programme.desc: A program that provides information about interesting places for vacations.

programme.title: BINTANG PANTURA 6
programme.desc: Bintang Pantura 6 is back! The legendary 'Juragan' Soimah, joined by her trusty assistant Nunung and business partner Inul Daratista, is on a mission to find 40 talented contestants. Who will make the cut and finally perform on the stage of their dreams?

programme.title: Amarah Terpendam Sang Istri Pendiam
programme.desc: Agam is a handsome, wealthy, and authoritarian playboy who is obsessed with having a son. He maintains two separate households for his wives, Intan and Bunga, both living in the same complex. However, his frustration grows as one wife gives him only daughters, while the other struggles with infertility.

programme.title: Kuwa Kuwi Dia Mainnya Cantik dan Elegan
programme.desc: Accidentally hitting Wisnu's (Ridwan Ghani) mother, Kirana (Angela Gilsha) hides the incident so she won't be blamed. The encounter brought them closer together. However, unexpectedly, Wisnu eventually discovered that it was Kirana who had hit his mother. What will happen to their relationship? Watch the full story only on SCTV's FTV - Kuwa Kuwi Dia Mainnya Cantik dan Elegan.

programme.title: Tiriac Open p/b Unicredit Bank (250) QF 1 & 2 & 3
programme.desc: The Tiriac Open is a professional men's ATP 250 tennis tournament held on outdoor clay courts in Bucharest, Romania. Revived in 2024 after an 8 year gap, it is the only ATP event in the country.

programme.title: 1st Round Qualifiers H/Ls Show
programme.desc: Catch all the triumphant moments from the 13 winning teams who are through to the second round of qualifiers.

programme.title: Charleston Open (500) Final
programme.desc: The Credit One Charleston Open is the largest women’s-only professional tennis tournament in North America, held annually on Daniel Island in Charleston, SC. As a top-tier WTA 500 event played on green clay, it serves as the premier clay-court kickoff for the tour. Founded in 1973, it is a historic, 9 day event attracting top-20 players.

programme.title: Tiriac Open p/b Unicredit Bank (250) Final
programme.desc: The Tiriac Open is a professional men's ATP 250 tennis tournament held on outdoor clay courts in Bucharest, Romania. Revived in 2024 after an 8 year gap, it is the only ATP event in the country.

programme.title: Barcelona Open Banc Sabadell (500) Final
programme.desc: The Barcelona Open is a prestigious annual ATP Tour 500 men's tennis tournament played on outdoor clay courts at the Real Club de Tenis Barcelona-1899 in Spain. Founded in 1953, it is a key European clay-court event and serves as a significant precursor to the French Open.

programme.title: Porsche Tennis Grand Prix (500) Final
programme.desc: The Porsche Tennis Grand Prix is a prestigious annual women’s professional tennis tournament held in Stuttgart, Germany, since 1978. As the oldest indoor women's tournament in Europe, it is a key WTA 500 event renowned for attracting top-tier players, played on indoor clay courts and noted for awarding the singles champion a Porsche sports car.

programme.title: Open Capfinances Rouen Métropole (250) Final
programme.desc: The Open de Rouen is a professional women’s tennis tournament on the WTA Tour, established in 2022 and held at the Kindarena in Rouen, France. The tournament offers over $275,000 in total prize money and features top international talent.

programme.title: BNP Paribas Open
programme.desc: Catch all the best moments from the Indian Wells Tennis Garden in Indian Wells, California, United States.

programme.title: Miami Open presented by Itau
programme.desc: Catch all the best moments from the Hard Rock Stadium in Miami Gardens. Florida.

programme.title: Finals
programme.desc: The Badminton Asia Championships is a tournament organized by governing body Badminton Asia to crown the best badminton players in Asia. It features competitions to determine the top badminton athletes across Asia in men's singles, women's singles, men's doubles, women's doubles, and mixed doubles.

programme.title: Miami Open presented by Itau
programme.desc: A look back at the 41st edition of the second event of the "Sunshine Double" from the hardcourts at the Hard Rock Stadium in Miami, Florida.

programme.title: Dubai Duty Free Tennis C'ships
programme.desc: A look back at the 34th edition of one of the most popular tournament stops of the ATP World Tour at the Dubai Duty Free Tennis Stadium.

programme.title: Tiriac Open p/b Unicredit Bank (250) SF 1
programme.desc: The Tiriac Open is a professional men's ATP 250 tennis tournament held on outdoor clay courts in Bucharest, Romania. Revived in 2024 after an 8 year gap, it is the only ATP event in the country.

programme.title: Tiriac Open p/b Unicredit Bank (250) Final
programme.desc: The Tiriac Open is a professional men's ATP 250 tennis tournament held on outdoor clay courts in Bucharest, Romania. Revived in 2024 after an 8 year gap, it is the only ATP event in the country.

programme.title: Barcelona Open Banc Sabadell (500) Final
programme.desc: The Barcelona Open is a prestigious annual ATP Tour 500 men's tennis tournament played on outdoor clay courts at the Real Club de Tenis Barcelona-1899 in Spain. Founded in 1953, it is a key European clay-court event and serves as a significant precursor to the French Open.

programme.title: Open Capfinances Rouen Métropole (250) QF 1 & 2
programme.desc: The Open de Rouen is a professional women’s tennis tournament on the WTA Tour, established in 2022 and held at the Kindarena in Rouen, France. The tournament offers over $275,000 in total prize money and features top international talent.

programme.title: Rolex Monte-Carlo Masters
programme.desc: A look back at the 119th edition of the Monte Carlo Masters from the Monte Carlo Country Club in Roquebrune-Cap-Martin, France.

programme.title: BMW Open by BitPanda (500) QF 1 & 2
programme.desc: The Bavarian International Tennis Championships is an annual, professional men's tennis tournament played on outdoor red clay courts in Munich, Germany, at the MTTC Iphitos complex. Founded in 1899, it has been sponsored by BMW since 1990 and the tournament is known for its intimate atmosphere in the heart of Munich.

programme.title: BMW Open by BitPanda (500) QF 3 & 4
programme.desc: The Bavarian International Tennis Championships is an annual, professional men's tennis tournament played on outdoor red clay courts in Munich, Germany, at the MTTC Iphitos complex. programme.title: Quarter-Finals & Semi-Finals

programme.title: Shutter Island

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第二十二集 女人呀 周慕孙精心铺垫，他给罗曼约了投资人，很自然一起吃饭。饭后，又见卖荷花的人，也想起上次电影看一半。周慕孙顺理成章带罗曼回家，借着电影坦诚自己从小颠沛流离，床上有人就睡不好，句句吐露余情未了，忽然陈凯西打来电话。罗曼恨铁不成钢吵起来，也没心思再跟周慕孙腻歪。周慕孙安抚她别再掺和别人夫妻家务事，说着给她戴上一条项链。

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第二十三集 嘿，女人 离婚协议赫然显现，陈勉笑问，陈凯西又是唱哪出？陈凯西回他。想给自己赎身？陈勉轰的一声懂了，钟倾城跟他约饭聊天是为了套行踪定位，那天在景山笑着跟他说电影台词，原来是把他当猎物耍？陈凯西要他的股份和跳跳的抚养权，现在签字，否则，罗曼就会用周慕孙的手机，把陈勉和张凡的股权转发到朋友圈，上市将化为泡影。

programme.title: 偶像疯子
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了资深铁杆粉丝出身的明星律师孟世娜（崔秀英饰），为了被诬陷为杀人嫌疑人的偶像都来益（金宰永饰）进行辩护，并由此展开的一系列故事。

programme.title: 陪玩的女人
programme.desc: 剧情讲述清洗了黑暗过去的大哥至焕（严泰九饰）和陪孩子们玩的米妮姐姐（韩善伙饰）银河之间满是反转和心动的爱情故事。

programme.title: 善良的女人夫世彌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕]一个保镖为了避开老板的敌人，藏身在乡村当幼儿园老师却意外遇上了新的挑战：一个心存怀疑的草莓农夫！

programme.title: 山河枕
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】大将军之女楚瑜（宋茜饰）因家族蒙冤，以卫家长嫂身份与卫家幼子卫韫（丁禹兮饰）共同追查七万将士战死真相，二人在抵御北狄入侵、揭露皇室阴谋的过程中渐生情愫，同时守护家国安宁。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 守诚者
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 全港警民全力守城 何浩辉带警员去找周雄，路上给邵峰打电话汇报情况。全球金融峰会现场的刘先生得知炸弹之事，告诉阮sir港府绝无可能向周雄妥协，阮sir表示已经安排警力，守备在会场的部分警力也调动过去，刘先生指示一定要在股市开市前拆除炸弹。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 叶景清临终前将保护白露的使命交给了翼无忧，希望他前往天启守护白露。白露在天启努力寻找合适的吉址，最终选定了一个既不劳民又不伤财的位置，并得到了彧修明的认可。然而，这一举动引起了界海天和樊如晦的不满。另一方面，七海伶为了拯救夜北族民，心生杀彧修明的想法，并暗中联合他人计划行动。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 生活在別处的我
programme.desc: 普通女孩夏果（钟楚曦饰）面临一个艰难的抉择，她会选择和男友在家乡过安稳温馨的生活，还是抓住机会在大城市追求事业成功？

programme.title: 生活在別处的我
programme.desc: 普通女孩夏果（钟楚曦饰）面临一个艰难的抉择，她会选择和男友在家乡过安稳温馨的生活，还是抓住机会在大城市追求事业成功？

programme.title: 山河枕

programme.title: 巾帼枭雄之悬崖
programme.desc: 桂婵知悉所有真相后，四海欲杀人灭口，危急关头十七赶至……桂婵送十七赴香港开始新生活，而自己则因身体状况，永远放弃做第二次手术。十七在香港与韦豪、花香等人团聚，原来众人在奕澄提供的居所住下来。韦豪和花香打算在港重开桂香楼，十七亦乐意注资，自己则四处找寻工作。十七终于找到一位赏识他的老板，成为投资部经理。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】明塱医院心胸外科顾问医生董一妍，完成了难度极高的手术，为医院奠定国际地位。此时，集团主席王进涛正身在欧洲古堡，为迎娶一妍作准备。进涛的长子王启智、二子王启聪均是继任主席的人选，两人都认为一妍是他们的威胁。启智的妻子陈丽雪是明塱慈善基金会主席，启聪的妻子文以珈则是正义律师。

programme.title: 逍遥

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 彧修明在朝上设立九州并下令斩杀反对的界海天。七海伶和界诸婴得知消息后十分悲痛。同时，白露在监督星瀚大典时发现贪官阴谋，并找到旧时相识顾惘然帮助揭露。界诸婴回到天启，试图领回父母遗体，但彧修明避而不见。白露查到樊征的贪污证据并告知彧修明，此时樊如晦等人正在密谋黑曜石的事情。

programme.desc: The closure of a beloved New York City diner deeply affects its employees and neighbors in this HBO Original Movie.

programme.title: Cinema Verite: The Saga Of An American Family
programme.desc: Witness the birth of reality TV in the early 1970s with the Loud family in this ground-breaking HBO Original Movie.

programme.title: News Night With Will Mcavoy
programme.desc: Will is distracted by a phone call and twitter post during his telecast; Sloan deals with a revenge post.

programme.title: John Mccain: For Whom The Bell Tolls
programme.desc: Explore the life of Sen. John McCain in this illuminating profile of one of the most influential forces in modern American politics.

programme.title: Iron Jawed Angels
programme.desc: Hilary Swank and Anjelica Huston star in this HBO Original Movie about the women's suffragette movement in 1920s America.

programme.title: Save The Last Dance
programme.desc: A small-town girl with big dreams must face the biggest challenge of her life - to stay true to her dream and her new romance.

programme.title: Ferrell Takes The Field

programme.title: The Polar Express
programme.desc: A doubting boy finds out first-hand that Santa exists when he goes aboard a magical train headed for the North Pole.

programme.title: Black Bag

programme.title: Juror #2

programme.title: Best Fruit Forward
programme.desc: The home bakers bejewel a chocolate sculpture; the bakers create an appealing entremets that replicates a piece of fruit.

programme.title: World of Flavor
programme.desc: With the immunity off the table, the top six bakers pair up to build a magnificent meringue tower; after receiving a postcard from home, the bakers embark on a sweet journey and deliver a dessert showcasing an international ingredient.

programme.title: Lights, Camera, Chocolate!
programme.desc: The remaining five bakers must rise to the occasion as they bake chocolate bread and use it to make a dessert deli sandwich; in the elimination challenges, the bakers must create a dessert inspired by an iconic film genre.

programme.title: Sweet Suspensions
programme.desc: The final four use their chocolate and confectionary skills to create a delectable trifle terrarium; with one elimination challenge before the finale, the bakers must create a three-tiered suspended cake.
