programme.title: The stick
programme.desc: Aza Yah demands her stick and her cowrie shells from Kongouet Bian. She wants to destroy him, but he manages to persuade her not to harm him.

programme.title: Talking with Oum
programme.desc: Yann and his little sister Marina live with their uncle Patrick, a famous oceanographer, on a Polynesian atoll. The two children meet Oum, a mysterious white dolphin who's always keen to help those he likes. Their friendship sees them exploring the ocean depths together.

programme.title: Un Si Grand Soleil
programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. Between romance and crime thriller, with a blend of comic and serious themes, their stories weave a fascinating web.

programme.title: Le Point
programme.desc: Magazine programme which explores issues relating to society, science and the environment, involving investigations and in-depth analysis, from a resolutely Canadian perspective.

programme.title: Le Journal De France 2
programme.desc: The television news programme of the France 2 editorial board (1 p.m. edition, Paris time).

programme.title: Mauvaise Graine
programme.desc: Deprived of his favourite car by his father, a young idler joins a gang of car thieves. There he falls in love with the muse of the gang, but above all he must be wary of the kingpin who runs it. The first steps of a filmmaker destined to become one of Hollywood's greatest.

programme.title: Panier De Crabes
programme.desc: A city-dweller in his 30s, who is recovering from burnout, stops next to a wild lake. Whereas he thought that he had found solitude and tranquillity, the place turns out to be not as calm and isolated as it appeared.

programme.title: RBC Heritage Round 4
programme.desc: The Heritage is South Carolina's only signature event on the PGA TOUR. It was first played 56 years ago in 1969. The venue for its entire existence has been the Harbour Town Golf Links at the Sea Pines Resort on Hilton Head Island. The original purse of USD$100,000 (USD$770,000 in today’s dollars) has jumped to USD$20 million.

programme.title: The Chicken Has Landed / The Night of the Nibbler
programme.desc: Archibald takes an unexpected trip to outer space. When a yummy recipe goes missing, Archibald P.I. sets out to crack the case.

programme.title: The Case Of The Missing Anchor
programme.desc: The Ninjas are giving a special display of acrobatics and climbing to Noddy, the Pirates and the Knights. It looks amazing! Noddy goes back to Toy Green to tell Big Ears all about it and narrowly misses being run over by the runaway Pirates Galleon. Someone has taken their sticky anchor and without it they've no way of stopping the ship! Noddy needs to investigate before there's an accident! He follows all the clues which leads him to the Knights.

programme.title: The Case Of The Disappearing Traffic Cones
programme.desc: When the Builders' traffic cones disappear from their building site, there is chaos all over Brickabuild. Noddy decides to investigate right away and find out who's taken them. Did the Naughticorns take them for their obstacle course? Or was it Farmer Tom who used them to keep his animals under control. Noddy carefully follows the clues and at last discovers it was the Pirates who took them to use as markers for Stripes' Pirate Galleon Driving Test.

programme.title: The Case Of The Disappearing Special Things
programme.desc: When Fuse's collection of Special Things goes missing, Noddy vows to track them down. He soon works out that Bling was in Fuse's Workshop but it turns out that she just went in to add a Special Thing to Fuse's collection. More clues lead Noddy to Smartysaurus. She admits she went into Fuse's Workshop but tripped on an oil can and fled when she saw all the mess she'd made. As for the Special Things, they'd already gone when she got there.

programme.title: The Case Of The Grey Coins
programme.desc: The Captain is upset because all of his shiny gold coins have been painted grey. It's a disaster as far as the pirates are concerned! Noddy decides to investigate. He realises that the grey coins are actually the gold coin covered with paint. They're not the only things that have turned grey too - Deltoid's shiny gold medal has been painted grey too.

programme.title: Why Puffadder Sheds His Skin
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Puff Adder didn't shed his skin. All the animals were afraid of Puff Adder because he was very difficult to see and he had a nasty bite. Puff Adder decides that if no beast wants to be his friend then he doesn't want to have any friends. He slithers far, far away to the desert where he bumps into Camel and learns that every animal needs a friend. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Why Eagle Rules The Skies
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Eagle didn't rule the skies. She was a humble bird who kept herself to self. But then one day things start going wrong for the birds - some beast steals Hen's eggs, Hummingbird loses her hum and Tickbird goes missing! Eagle quietly saves the day and Lion rewards her with half his Kingdom. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Postman Pat And The Cornish Caper
programme.desc: Ted Glenn's Cornish cousin Ned is sending him a steam engine as an alternative means to power his workshop. Pat and Jess set off to Cornwall to collect this very large special delivery in the SDS Plane whilst Ted sets about giving away all of his old inventions to the people of Greendale in order to clear out enough space for the engine. Pat and Jess meet the eccentric Ned Glenn at his workshop and wrestle with the crate containing the heavy engine to get it aboard the plane.

programme.title: Postman Pat And The Giant Pumpkin
programme.desc: Pat has to deliver some pumpkins to Greendale School for the annual Halloween Pumpkin Party. But when he picks them up from Ted's workshop, Jess starts playing with a giant pumpkin and it rolls into the river and floats away. Pat follows it along the river and tries to fish it out with Alf's rod but the pumpkin is too heavy and the line breaks. As the party gets under way in Greendale, the giant pumpkin floats out to sea and Pat and Jess board the SDS Orca and head out into Pencaster Bay.

programme.title: High-Tech Overload
programme.desc: Big Chris has got a new gadget to monitor the cars. He puts it to the test, what could possibly go wrong?!

programme.title: Workshop Chaos
programme.desc: Big Chris is furious when Marsha tidies up his workshop - how's he supposed to work in these conditions? Luckily Flash saves helps out by messing it up again!

programme.title: Silver Hatch Shapes Up
programme.desc: Conrod is having an engine tune up at Silver Hatch. He boasts that his spoilers make him faster than all the other cars… who then want to be just as fast as their V8 hero…

programme.title: Pit Stop Perils
programme.desc: Mr Carburettor is fed up with Roary and Maxi constantly bickering about who is the fastest car at Silver Hatch. He decrees that the pair will have a race, and whoever wins, is the fastest - no more arguing!

programme.title: The Case Of The Lost Space Rocket
programme.desc: Smartysaurus is going to launch into space in her all-new super space rocket. But as her friends all watch on the Daredale Big Screen, the picture suddenly goes dead! Noddy investigates to find out what happened to Smartysaurus.

programme.title: The Case Of The Smartysaurus's Jet Pack
programme.desc: Smartysaurus is trying out her new jet pack, but she hasn't read the instructions before taking off and cannot control it properly. Noddy investigates to help her control it before things get too dangerous.

programme.title: The Case Of The Topsy Turvy Trees
programme.desc: All is set for the Toy Green Picnic until Noddy finds some of the trees turned upside down! Was it the Ninjas climbing on them? Or the Pirates wanting an upside-down tree for Pirate Bay? Noddy launches an investigation to find out who's behind all this.

programme.title: The Case Of The Golden Thing
programme.desc: The Knights have found a mysterious Golden Thing. But the Pirates insist it's their Golden Thing. Noddy tries to settle the argument by investigating: Who is the owner of the Golden Thing? He soon finds more and more Golden Things have been hidden all over Toyland.

programme.title: Happy CAT-O-Ween
programme.desc: It’s Cat-O-Ween in the dollhouse, and all the Gabby Cats are in the holiday spirit. Gabby and Pandy dress up and go trick-or-treating around the dollhouse, where they make cat-o-lanterns with Baby Box, search for hidden treats with MerCat, and make Banana ghosts with Cakey. Along the way, CatRat plays silly tricks on them, but in the end Floyd manages to trick them all! For the Cat of the Day segment, all the Gabby Cats sing a special Cat-O-Ween song.

programme.title: A Cat-Tabulous Christmas
programme.desc: It's Christmas time in the dollhouse! After putting the final topper on the Christmas tree, Figgy the Elf calls and says that Santa Kitty needs help in his workshop, it's up to Gabby and Pandy to go help her out. After some toy fixing and boxing fun, Gabby and Pandy get to meet Santa Kitty and his Kitty reindeer and join him delivering presents to all their friends in the dollhouse.

programme.title: Boo to You
programme.desc: Burple gets spooked by the legend of a ghost called the Phantom Fang. But when he senses the story is real, he can't get his friends to believe him.

programme.title: Where There's Smoke
programme.desc: After Magnus accuses Cutter of setting fires near the village that could hurt the sheep, the Riders have to put them out and find the real culprit.

programme.title: Rodney J. Dinkle, Babysitter / Lights Out
programme.desc: When accident-prone Rodney gets hired to babysit a mischievous toddler, TZG secretly watches over their safety. / When there’s a power outage in Harmony Harbor, TZG secretly helps the townsfolk beat the blackout.

programme.title: Gratitude
programme.desc: When Phoebe’s Gratitude Day card flies away before she can give it to Marcus, the Dews try to help her recreate it - perfectly. But they learn that you don't have to be perfect to show your gratitude for someone. / When Athena finds herself a little short-handed at the Fairhaven Summer Fair, her cousin, Reed, comes to help; only to give Athena more problems to fix.

programme.title: The Case Of The Lost Space Rocket
programme.desc: Smartysaurus is going to launch into space in her all-new super space rocket. But as her friends all watch on the Daredale Big Screen, the picture suddenly goes dead! Noddy investigates to find out what happened to Smartysaurus.

programme.title: The Case Of The Smartysaurus's Jet Pack
programme.desc: Smartysaurus is trying out her new jet pack, but she hasn't read the instructions before taking off and cannot control it properly. Noddy investigates to help her control it before things get too dangerous.

programme.title: The Case Of The Topsy Turvy Trees
programme.desc: All is set for the Toy Green Picnic until Noddy finds some of the trees turned upside down! Was it the Ninjas climbing on them? Or the Pirates wanting an upside-down tree for Pirate Bay? Noddy launches an investigation to find out who's behind all this.

programme.title: The Case Of The Golden Thing
programme.desc: The Knights have found a mysterious Golden Thing. But the Pirates insist it's their Golden Thing. Noddy tries to settle the argument by investigating: Who is the owner of the Golden Thing? He soon finds more and more Golden Things have been hidden all over Toyland.

programme.title: Dollhouse Safari
programme.desc: It's time for a safari adventure in the dollhouse! Carlita, decked out like a safari truck, takes Gabby and Pandy on an adventure through the dollhouse as they follow clues to find the mysterious Felis Catus and discover all kinds of other dollhouse wildlife along the way! For the COTD segment, Cakey and Parrot show us how to make adorable safari snacks.

programme.title: Abra-CAT-Dabra
programme.desc: Baby Box is learning to be a great magician and wants to pull a rabbit out of a hat. But when there's no rabbit to be found, Gabby, Pandy and Baby Box visit the other Gabby Cats for help. For the COTD, Baby Box, Gabby and Pandy sing the "Whoopsies!" Song.

programme.title: She Said, She Said / Starfish
programme.desc: When one of Rikki’s plants won't sing, Pixie and Juniper both tell their varying recollections of why the plant is suddenly silent. / Kelp, Scallop, and Cruz have always thought that starfish did nothing but laze about; but as they go about their day, the starfish goes through his own routine, completely unbeknownst to everyone else.

programme.title: Leroy’s Caterpillar / Lost Spark
programme.desc: Leroy must learn to let go when his caterpillar friend turns into a butterfly. / When Pixie loses her spark, Kelp and Juniper look for the plant they think will cure her. Meanwhile Pixie wonders whether she can be cured at all!

programme.title: Ding Dong Day \ Grand Sam
programme.desc: It’s Pawston’s annual Take Your Kid to Work Day, and it’s Tag’s year to spend the day at the Doorbell Store with Paw. \ Sam Whippet challenges the Not Yet Cadets to complete an obstacle course in the woods.

programme.title: Clucky Day \ Take Me Out to the Fetch Game
programme.desc: Scooch is bummed out because he’s missing his favorite holiday back in his old farm town, so Tag wants to cheer him up by rounding up some chickens and bringing Clucky Day to Pawston. \ When there’s a schedule mix-up and the Pawston Get Sox players think they have a day off, it’s up to Tag and Scooch to round up all five players in time for the fetch game, so that they don’t have to forfeit.

programme.title: Scrapadactyls
programme.desc: When Revvit and his Reptool friends venture out of their ravine, the Dinotrux band together to save them from a flock of savage Scrapadactyls.

programme.title: Back To The Starting Line
programme.desc: As a new term begins, Maricela and her horse, Mystery, arrive at the academy to join Lucky, Pru and Abigail for the school year.

programme.title: Punch Thunk Love / Nay Boors
programme.desc: When Eep and the others try to intervene with Thunk and Blurg's first date, they decide to run away so they can live happily ever after; Snoot and Ugga race each other to get to the Doomsday Skunkguin but are forced to put their differences aside once the weirder animals come out to hunt them down

programme.title: Caverns And Creepers / Rad Teacher
programme.desc: When Eep is kicked out of Thunk's new imaginary role-playing adventure game she decides to play her own, real version of the game; Fed up with Squawk's mean teaching style, Eep has Grug fire him and replace him with Rad, the quintessential young, cool teacher

programme.title: Edge Of Disaster Pt 1
programme.desc: When Ruffnut is captured by Dragon Hunters, it's up to Astrid and Tuffnut to defend Dragon's Edge from the invading Dragon Hunter army Dragon's Edge from the invading Dragon Hunter army

programme.title: Edge Of Disaster Pt 2
programme.desc: Unaware of the war on Dragon's Edge, Hiccup, Snotlout and Johann discover an island full of dragons that have been wounded by the Dragon Hunters

programme.title: Apok-ta-pokalypse Now Part 1
programme.desc: As the Dragon Knights prepare to battle for the weapons and control of Tikal, Mastodon attempts to teach Po how to access storm powers to use in the fight. Blade comes face to face with Klaus and Veruca.

programme.title: Apok-ta-pokalypse Now Part 2
programme.desc: The team heads into a final confrontation for the weapons that not only threatens Tikal, but their lives. And Po must share hero duties with Mastodon.

programme.title: Dollhouse Fairy Tales
programme.desc: The Gabby Cats put their own spin on the classic fairytales "Rapunzel," "The Princess and the Pea," and "Little Red Riding Hood." For the Cat of the Day Segment, CatRat sings a song!

programme.title: Happy CAT-O-Ween
programme.desc: It’s Cat-O-Ween in the dollhouse, and all the Gabby Cats are in the holiday spirit. Gabby and Pandy dress up and go trick-or-treating around the dollhouse, where they make cat-o-lanterns with Baby Box, search for hidden treats with MerCat, and make Banana ghosts with Cakey. Along the way, CatRat plays silly tricks on them, but in the end Floyd manages to trick them all! For the Cat of the Day segment, all the Gabby Cats sing a special Cat-O-Ween song.

programme.title: A Cat-Tabulous Christmas
programme.desc: It's Christmas time in the dollhouse! After putting the final topper on the Christmas tree, Figgy the Elf calls and says that Santa Kitty needs help in his workshop, it's up to Gabby and Pandy to go help her out. After some toy fixing and boxing fun, Gabby and Pandy get to meet Santa Kitty and his Kitty reindeer and join him delivering presents to all their friends in the dollhouse.

programme.title: Chicago
programme.desc: Boss and family go on Spring Break to visit his grandparents in the big city of Chicago. Boss uses the trip to test his business mettle, by getting in a promotion war at a real big adult company. And when a department store refuses to let Gigi and Tim return an item, they wind up unionizing the entire sales force.

programme.title: Baby Boss
programme.desc: Mom and Dad are panicking after Gigi noticed Boss isn't growing, so Boss "puts himself under", taking a special formula that will turn him int a regular baby long enough to pass a Doctor's checkup. However, with Boss gone, all the villains from this season see it as the perfect time to strike Baby Corp, leaving Staci to hold the floodgates.

programme.title: Boom Baby
programme.desc: Looking to trim costs, Boss unknowingly fires Boom Baby, a super-undercover Baby Corp worker who displays to parents how unsafe things are by pratfalling on them and crying for attention. Convinced he's the victim of a conspiracy, Boom leaves a wake of parent worry in his path, forcing Boss to stop him.

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Disturbing Dilemma of the Dysfunctional Doppelgangers
programme.desc: The crew meets their blue-hued doppelgängers when they crash-land on an alien planet where kids call all the shots.

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Confusing Crisis of the Conniving Captive
programme.desc: Melvin isn't exactly their friend ... but it's not like George and Harold can just let him be held captive by diabolical Biglyans, right? Right?!?

programme.title: Captain Underpants and the Aggravated Assault of the Alien Armada
programme.desc: Oh, the indignity: George and Harold are forced to perform spa treatments on gigantic Biglyans. Also, Dr. Fitzgibbons reveals a shocking secret.

programme.title: The Giant Haboob
programme.desc: Cleve Kelso breaks Rafaela Moreno and a dangerous, cybernetic prisoner named Matsuo Mori from a high-security ice prison. Back in LA, Tony and the crew experience a major shake-up when Echo gets accepted to Ms. Nowhere’s spy training but Tony is rejected. While Tony is grappling with his identity crisis, Echo struggles to survive spy school, and Ms. Nowhere and Gary disappear in a massive North African storm during their hunt for Cleve. Echo must lead the Toretto crew and finish Ms.

programme.title: The Dead End
programme.desc: The team travels to Nihaya, or "The Dead End," in their pursuit of Nowhere’s mission. Unfortunately they run into some of Layla’s spurned former criminal partner Sandocal, who steals the kids’ cars for revenge on Layla. With Frostee, Cisco, and Echo held captive, Tony and Layla drive for Sandocal in a dune buggy race to win back their crew’s freedom.

programme.title: The Empty Well
programme.desc: The kids are low on supplies in the Sahara and stumble on a town with a well that has mysteriously run dry. The crew decides to investigate and discovers a Cleve Kelso-controlled water facility that’s stealing water from the village. They manage to blow up the facility, but it alerts Rafaela and Matsuo to their whereabouts.

programme.title: Buffalord Soldier
programme.desc: Astrid comes down with the Odin's Revenge flu and the Riders must search for the cure by finding a nearly extinct Buffalord dragon before Viggo does.

programme.title: A Grim Retreat
programme.desc: The Riders head to a tropical island for fun in the sun, not realizing it's infested with Grimora Leeches which drives their dragons to turn on them.

programme.title: To Heather Or Not To Heather
programme.desc: When Heather and Windshear land on Dragon's Edge to join the Dragon Rider crew, they quickly discover that Windshear doesn't play well with others.

programme.title: Homecoming
programme.desc: When Gunmar discovers Jim’s friends are in the Darklands, it becomes a race against time as the Trollhunters and Gunmar try to escape

programme.title: Hiss Hiss Bang Bang
programme.desc: Eager to return to normal life, Jim struggles with re-adjusting as he leads the Trollhunting team to track down three Goblins that escaped the Darklands

programme.title: Hero With A Thousand Faces
programme.desc: Jim tries to impress Claire's parents when invited over for BBQ, but when his Amulet goes haywire, Jim must contend with his own worst enemy - himself

programme.title: Slow Boat to England
programme.desc: Po and Blade head to the docks to take Klaus and Veruca to England, and Po tries to have fun with her on their last day together. However, Klaus and Veruca break free and hold Po hostage; Blade shockingly gives up the location of the fire whip to save him.

programme.title: The Knight's Fall - Part 1
programme.desc: Po and Blade rush to warn the Emperor about the weasels, but he has Po arrested and Colin captures Blade, revealing that she was never a knight. Thrown in a cell, Po reunites with Rukhmini and Mr. Ping, and he copes with the truth about Blade as they break out. Po fights Klaus and Veruca but is outmatched. Blade defeats Colin and hurries to help Po but is too late.

programme.title: Big Adventures: Into Thailand with Sue Perkins (S1)
programme.desc: Sue reaches the final episode with a visit to the country's heady and exotic capital, Bangkok.

programme.title: Salmon
programme.desc: Patrick is in British Columbia to observe the annual salmon run, which plays a crucial role in ensuring the species' survival while also sustaining the entire rainforest ecosystem.

programme.title: Earth's Biggest Festival: Kumbh Mela (S1)
programme.desc: The story of the Kumbh Mela, the festival estimated to gather 400 million people over 45 days. As Hindus make the pilgrimage to bathe at the riverbank, tragedy strikes on the holiest day of the event.

programme.title: Ireland
programme.desc: On Great Blasket Island, off the coast of Ireland, Ben stays with London couple Dan and Emily, who landed an extraordinary job as island caretakers on Europe's rugged western frontier.

programme.title: The World's Deadliest Weather (S5)
programme.desc: In the US a man and his dog take cover as a rare tornado outbreak rips through towns on the East coast. In Norway, a boxer has the fight of his life when a swim under the ice goes disastrously wrong and in Western Australia, a homeowner is in a faceoff with the flames.

programme.title: Big Cats 24/7 (S2)
programme.desc: Back together again, the lion mums struggle to feed many mouths, and one cub is starving.

programme.title: Food Factory (S1)
programme.desc: Discover why potatoes go on a wild hydraulic ride to become crunchy chips; how machines and human hands have to perfectly co-exist to make the South Asian dessert fav gulab jamun; how 6 million eggs can make 75 million delectable almond biscotti.

programme.title: Food Factory (S1)
programme.desc: Discover why peanuts enjoy a good tumble and hot oil roast; how an industrial juicer pours out massive amounts of creamy mango smoothies; the secret chemistry behind full fat bocconcini cheese; and how vegan brownies can be healthy and sinfully delicious.

programme.desc: Griff Rhys Jones' journey across NZ using only the back roads sees him travel from Queenstown, over The Remarkables, and finishes his trip at the very tip of the country, Bluff.

programme.title: Southern Stingrays
programme.desc: Bad weather causes sea sickness among the team, and their next diving lesson has to be abandoned.

programme.title: Nurse Sharks
programme.desc: It's time to celebrate, as Steve Backshall's team of ten shark saviours have all passed their dive training and are now fully qualified scuba divers.

programme.title: Germany and Austria
programme.desc: Joanna's emotional exploration begins at the river's source, Germany's Black Forest mountains, ends at the Romanian/Ukrainian border, and marks two key anniversaries. The first is D-Day - the beginning of the end of World War Two and a brief era of freedom.

programme.title: Rome
programme.desc: A weak emperor. A divided empire. Barbarians at the gate. Does this perfect storm mean the end of ancient Rome?

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第二十二集 女人呀 周慕孙精心铺垫，他给罗曼约了投资人，很自然一起吃饭。饭后，又见卖荷花的人，也想起上次电影看一半。周慕孙顺理成章带罗曼回家，借着电影坦诚自己从小颠沛流离，床上有人就睡不好，句句吐露余情未了，忽然陈凯西打来电话。罗曼恨铁不成钢吵起来，也没心思再跟周慕孙腻歪。周慕孙安抚她别再掺和别人夫妻家务事，说着给她戴上一条项链。

programme.title: 亲爱的仇敌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 第二十三集 嘿，女人 离婚协议赫然显现，陈勉笑问，陈凯西又是唱哪出？陈凯西回他。想给自己赎身？陈勉轰的一声懂了，钟倾城跟他约饭聊天是为了套行踪定位，那天在景山笑着跟他说电影台词，原来是把他当猎物耍？陈凯西要他的股份和跳跳的抚养权，现在签字，否则，罗曼就会用周慕孙的手机，把陈勉和张凡的股权转发到朋友圈，上市将化为泡影。

programme.title: 偶像疯子
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了资深铁杆粉丝出身的明星律师孟世娜（崔秀英饰），为了被诬陷为杀人嫌疑人的偶像都来益（金宰永饰）进行辩护，并由此展开的一系列故事。

programme.title: 陪玩的女人
programme.desc: 剧情讲述清洗了黑暗过去的大哥至焕（严泰九饰）和陪孩子们玩的米妮姐姐（韩善伙饰）银河之间满是反转和心动的爱情故事。

programme.title: 善良的女人夫世彌
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕]一个保镖为了避开老板的敌人，藏身在乡村当幼儿园老师却意外遇上了新的挑战：一个心存怀疑的草莓农夫！

programme.title: 山河枕
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】大将军之女楚瑜（宋茜饰）因家族蒙冤，以卫家长嫂身份与卫家幼子卫韫（丁禹兮饰）共同追查七万将士战死真相，二人在抵御北狄入侵、揭露皇室阴谋的过程中渐生情愫，同时守护家国安宁。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 守诚者
programme.desc: [附中英文字幕] 全港警民全力守城 何浩辉带警员去找周雄，路上给邵峰打电话汇报情况。全球金融峰会现场的刘先生得知炸弹之事，告诉阮sir港府绝无可能向周雄妥协，阮sir表示已经安排警力，守备在会场的部分警力也调动过去，刘先生指示一定要在股市开市前拆除炸弹。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 叶景清临终前将保护白露的使命交给了翼无忧，希望他前往天启守护白露。白露在天启努力寻找合适的吉址，最终选定了一个既不劳民又不伤财的位置，并得到了彧修明的认可。然而，这一举动引起了界海天和樊如晦的不满。另一方面，七海伶为了拯救夜北族民，心生杀彧修明的想法，并暗中联合他人计划行动。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 生活在別处的我
programme.desc: 普通女孩夏果（钟楚曦饰）面临一个艰难的抉择，她会选择和男友在家乡过安稳温馨的生活，还是抓住机会在大城市追求事业成功？

programme.title: 生活在別处的我
programme.desc: 普通女孩夏果（钟楚曦饰）面临一个艰难的抉择，她会选择和男友在家乡过安稳温馨的生活，还是抓住机会在大城市追求事业成功？

programme.title: 山河枕
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】大将军之女楚瑜（宋茜饰）因家族蒙冤，以卫家长嫂身份与卫家幼子卫韫（丁禹兮饰）共同追查七万将士战死真相，二人在抵御北狄入侵、揭露皇室阴谋的过程中渐生情愫，同时守护家国安宁。

programme.title: 巾帼枭雄之悬崖
programme.desc: 桂婵知悉所有真相后，四海欲杀人灭口，危急关头十七赶至……桂婵送十七赴香港开始新生活，而自己则因身体状况，永远放弃做第二次手术。十七在香港与韦豪、花香等人团聚，原来众人在奕澄提供的居所住下来。韦豪和花香打算在港重开桂香楼，十七亦乐意注资，自己则四处找寻工作。十七终于找到一位赏识他的老板，成为投资部经理。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 山河枕
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】大将军之女楚瑜（宋茜饰）因家族蒙冤，以卫家长嫂身份与卫家幼子卫韫（丁禹兮饰）共同追查七万将士战死真相，二人在抵御北狄入侵、揭露皇室阴谋的过程中渐生情愫，同时守护家国安宁。

programme.title: 巨塔之后
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】明塱医院心胸外科顾问医生董一妍，完成了难度极高的手术，为医院奠定国际地位。此时，集团主席王进涛正身在欧洲古堡，为迎娶一妍作准备。进涛的长子王启智、二子王启聪均是继任主席的人选，两人都认为一妍是他们的威胁。启智的妻子陈丽雪是明塱慈善基金会主席，启聪的妻子文以珈则是正义律师。

programme.title: 逍遥
programme.desc: 【附中英文字幕】讲述了生性洒脱的少女肖瑶（谭松韵饰）误入万妖谷引发风波，与万妖之王红烨（侯明昊饰）共同卷入神秘怪案。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 故事主要围绕“熊氏一家”在家中的生活点滴和工作上的繁忙。

programme.title: 星河长明
programme.desc: 彧修明在朝上设立九州并下令斩杀反对的界海天。七海伶和界诸婴得知消息后十分悲痛。同时，白露在监督星瀚大典时发现贪官阴谋，并找到旧时相识顾惘然帮助揭露。界诸婴回到天启，试图领回父母遗体，但彧修明避而不见。白露查到樊征的贪污证据并告知彧修明，此时樊如晦等人正在密谋黑曜石的事情。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 弟子也疯狂
programme.desc: 方世玉、洪熙官与胡惠干三位俗家弟子初入少林，拜于南院戒嗔大师门下习武。然而，三人常与出家弟子悟清较劲切磋，寺中从此喧嚷不绝，连方丈见此情景亦不免啼笑皆非。

programme.title: 西游记
programme.desc: 本片根据中国经典同名名著改编。故事讲述唐僧赴西天取经，中途在五指山收服马骝精；在高家庄收服猪八戒；在流沙河收服沙悟净的种种情节。。

programme.title: 大刺客
programme.desc: 这部史诗式电影的故事背景发生在六国时代，声名远播的刺客聂政决定隐退江湖。但当客卿严遂一家被杀害后，严遂找来隐居的剑客聂政相助，并游说他一起参予终极的复仇行动。

programme.title: 三闯少林
programme.desc: 四大家族之一的金虎堡堡主在一次押镖途中，被四名蒙面和尚劫杀。叶青花被怀疑与案有关，游侠雷迅助友洗脱嫌疑，竟卷入奇案，三闯少林。雷迅找出四名和尚，当众伏法，以为真相大白；岂料，不久武林又传出四名和尚到处行凶，雷迅才知道被人利用，引发连场打斗。

programme.title: 新不了情
programme.desc: 歌女青青与建筑师汤鹏南原是一对感情深厚的情侣，可惜好景不常，汤家突遭巨变，青青不惜出卖自己肉体以相助鹏南，想不到竟被鹏南误会而导致俩人分手。后来鹏南得知事情始末，欲挽回感情，可惜青青已患上绝症。

programme.title: 赌王大骗局
programme.desc: 沙氏家族的赌术、千术已达出神入化的境界，在赌坛更是无人不知，无人不晓，而沙通更是青出于蓝而胜于蓝，在赌坛素有"赌王"之誉，甚少遇到对手。然而，沙通亦背负一段由赌而来的深仇，其师遭牌霸彭天石诬告贩毒，被判刑十多年。沙通矢志为师报仇，欲以"老千千老千， 骗子骗骗子"的手段对付彭天石...

programme.title: 双镯
programme.desc: 两名少女作盟誓要在一个没有女权，甚或缺乏性自由的小渔村互相照顾一生。一位最终下嫁自己不认识的人，之后过着幸福快乐的日子。而另一位少女则惨遭许配给虐待成性的富家子，于是她唯有设法摆脱这个困境。

programme.title: 绝代双骄
programme.desc: 江小鱼在父母被杀后，与孪生兄弟花无缺失散。自小被带往恶人谷，并由一班恶人谷谷主共同抚养成人的江小鱼，长大后决定离开恶人谷，出外闯蘯江湖。他最后可否成功为父母报仇，又能否再遇孪生兄弟花无缺？

programme.title: 白蛇传
programme.desc: 妖精白素贞跟妹妹青青在凡间巧遇前世救命恩人书生许仙，后更以身相许给许仙。后和尚法海揭穿其身份并把这对苦命鸳鸯拆散...

programme.title: 长辈
programme.desc: 家境富裕的大财主立带男为填房，为了避免那不可靠的侄子夺取家产，他在病重前立下遗嘱，更要求带男将遗嘱交给省城的另一侄子。当带男这个年轻长辈遇上侄子及他的儿子时，更闹出一连串的笑话。惠英红更藉此夺第一届香港电影金像奖影后。

programme.title: 喷火美人鱼
programme.desc: 三对年青男女出海渡假，忽然听到新闻报导：一个穿红色比坚尼泳衣的女郎一连杀了十三人，并正驾驶着快艇逃亡。正在此时，一个美的女郎破浪而来，身穿红色比坚尼。女郎要求跟他们同上岛避风。当晚，女郎的挑逗令众男女之间产生前所未有的冲突... 电影未到最后一分钟，不知结局。

programme.title: 绝不低头
programme.desc: 少女波波为寻父和找寻未婚夫罗烈，遇上童时玩伴黑豹，黑豹是城中势力最大金二爷的助手。波波在黑豹照料下，逐渐忘记罗烈而爱上黑豹，黑豹自幼就喜欢波波，但是处处输给罗烈，心狠手辣的他，逼婚不成，便在波波面前折磨金二爷，原来金二爷竟是波波的父亲赵大爷，后来罗烈出狱...

programme.title: 魔界
programme.desc: 故事讲述，警局侦缉部情侣探员郑忠与王丽芬同往离岛露营，半夜丽芬忽闻异声，离营探看，突见绿光一闪，随即着魔。翌日，王警官率众处理一宗挟持人质案件，期间丽芬径自开枪射杀劫匪，过程被杂志记者阿古摄得，发现子弹竟能转向杀人...

programme.title: 南少林与北少林
programme.desc: 满清入主中原后，北少林为免遭剿灭，只好受命派出弟子到清军府担任教头，谁知抵达后，始知府中已有南少林教头；期间将军挑动两派人不和继而公开比武互相残杀，后南派因弟子伤亡而与北派交恶，展开一番互相残杀...

programme.title: 风花雪月
programme.desc: 本片由两个单元故事组成。首个故事讲述柳宣教策划了一个破玉通禅师「色戒」之奇计，着美艳妓女红莲向玉通大施色诱攻势。第二个故事讲述少女冯玉华之母冯孙氏欠下九尾狐一笔钱无法偿还，被逼做妓女还债。后冯孙氏因性病死去，遗下一笔债务以及殓葬费须玉华偿还；玉华无奈，只好踏上母亲所走过之路...

programme.title: 侠士行
programme.desc: 严太师遇刺毙命，护卫范义追击刺客至穷巷，见他踏镖逾墙逸去，而镖乃寇英之器，范遂遍城贴满通缉寇的画像。寇取得遇害县官宋化龙身上的公文，得以入城，却仍为范捉拿，幸得酒店店主的女儿雪娘，自认寇是其表哥，寇才幸免被捕；寇向雪道出自己的身份及真相。其后，范遭假扮成寇的寨主贺西雷袭击，而救回他的竟是......

programme.title: 双星伴月
programme.desc: 乡村少女阿娇、流浪汉大傻、收山老倌二叔公三人同住危楼，生活清苦但互相扶持。其后阿娇被捧为歌星，从此飞黄腾达，但她却渐渐发觉自己失去了最重要的东西...

programme.title: 清宫大刺杀
programme.desc: 雍正雄才大略，残忍狠毒，特组「血滴子」特务集团，以作暗杀反清人士的工具。不料，马腾不值雍正滥杀无辜，乃叛变潜逃出宫。雍正怕后患无穷，命御前侍卫刚振风及宣宝鹰，务必将马缉拿到手。马携妻儿在昔日同僚追杀下，辗转逃亡，匿于江南，开设打铁馆，并发明铁伞以破血滴子...

programme.title: 怒海情仇
programme.desc: 故事描述，青年渔夫鲁金虎与渔女小玉自幼相好；土豪独子耀祖，垂涎小玉美色，时藉故亲近；一天耀祖欺负寡妇五嫂，金虎抱不平，几动武，惹小玉误会金虎与五嫂有不寻常关系...

programme.title: 边城三侠
programme.desc: 一群受知县压迫的农民绑架了官员的女儿，试图藉此引起当局的重视。此时，一位流浪剑客伸出援手，与两位曾是压迫者、后来沦为被压迫者的侠士携手合作，三人联手反抗知县的暴行！

programme.title: 宋宫秘史
programme.desc: 包公发现刘妃在二十年前为保其位而谋害李妃，将李妃刚诞下的儿子调走后，把她逐出皇宫。于是，包公用妙计诱大太监郭槐认罪，揭发当年他与刘妃合谋陷害李妃之奸计，并将刘妃定罪。而李妃也被接回皇宫，与已为皇帝的儿子团聚。

programme.title: 冷血十三鹰
programme.desc: 铁船帮杀手戚明星决意要逃离帮会后，遭其帮会杀手追杀，幸得侠士卓一帆所救，才幸免于难。其后卓一帆意外发现戚明星竟是其杀妻仇人，但在得悉戚明星对此愧疚不已后，饶恕他的过犯。最终两人惺惺相惜，决定联手击败铁船帮.

programme.title: 云泥
programme.desc: 女主角熊素素因不能接受机师男友意外身亡而患上精神分裂症，一天巧遇留学归来的精神科医生黎易非，多次奇幻的相遇令易非和素素卷入三角恋和复杂的内心纠结之中。

programme.title: 布衣神相
programme.desc: 东瀛甲派忍者血洗武当，并命人污蔑于无敌门掌门独孤无敌。云飞扬练成天蚕神功后，决意为武当报仇，挑战独孤无敌，但却被打败至重伤。幸得布衣神相李布衣所助，伤患得以复原，才能逃避忍者的追杀。

programme.title: 蓝与黑续集

programme.title: 生死门
programme.desc: 铁匠仇子玉，擅打利刀，且为武林高手，本已退隐江湖，但正气未泯，应武林大豪屠一堃之邀，联手对抗四大巨盗，夺回价值连城的飞龙璧物归原主。谁知屠只是利用「鹬蚌相争，渔人得利」的局面夺取该璧据为己有，事成后仇亦惨遭毒手。飞刀手云翔知悉屠之卑鄙手段后，登时大发志士之愤，勇闯屠布下之旗阵夺取飞龙璧，交回侦缉队长...

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Snow
programme.desc: Peppa and her friends and family are looking forward to a trip to the beach where they can make sandcastles, but when they arrive at the beach there is too much snow!

programme.title: The Cave Barbapapas / The Little Monsters
programme.desc: The barbababies discover a strange cave. Barbalib tells the story of the caves Barbapapa and how they transformed. // The Barbababies have a sleepover in the living room. Fearing the monsters in the closet, they set up wacky traps to catch them.

programme.title: The Perfect Dinner / The Kittens
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Barbamama go out to celebrate their birthdays. Barbabelle is in charge and gets overwhelmed. // Barbabelle watches Bali's kittens. She's scared something will happen and won't let them out. Barbamama must intervene to help the kittens.

programme.title: Safety Croc / Good Sport Croc
programme.desc: When Daisy skins her knee learning to skateboard, Mr. Crocodile tries to keep her from ever getting another booboo. // Good sports Mr. Crocodile and Daisy face off in a game of soccer with bad sport Winston.

programme.title: Breakfast Bots
programme.desc: Can Robot Blaze stop the Breakfast Bots before they bury Axle City in breakfast?

programme.title: The Far, Far Away Machine
programme.desc: Crusher uses Gabby's Far, Far Away Machine to send three of Blaze's friends far, far away! Now, Blaze must rescue his friends from the Ice Age, Ancient Egypt, and Medieval Times!

programme.title: The Crew Builds An Observatory / The Crew Builds A Zipline
programme.desc: The pups jump into action to build an observatory to help their friend River get a cool picture of a shooting star! // After meeting Park Ranger Rose, the pups get stuck on a nature trail. But Rubble & Crew, finds a construction solution.

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Library Tea Shop / The Crew Builds A Dance Floor
programme.desc: Construction on the first Builder Cove library is abuzz with bees! This calls for an extra sweet constuction solution. / Grandpa Gravel teaches Charger all his best moves for the big dance contest. But will a runaway disco ball cost them first place?

programme.title: Pups Save the Bears / Pups Save a Farmerless Farm
programme.desc: Bears are asleep all over town! The PAW Patrol must work quietly to save the bears and return them to their cave. // With the farmers out of town, Mayor Goodway calls the PAW Patrol to wrangle the animals and control the chaos on the farmerless farm

programme.title: Pups Save a White Wolf / Pups Save a Wrong Way Explorer
programme.desc: After a sudden snow storm, Everest cares for a wolf cub as they work together to help the PAW Patrol find them. // Famous wrong-way explorer, Travelling Travis accidentally takes Chickaletta to the North Pole where they run into some crocodiles?

programme.title: Child Of The Stars I / Child Of The Stars II
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Lolita spotted a flying saucer approaching their house. // The Barbapapa have taken off aboard Bababam in the hope of discovering the planet of Baby Big Feet.

programme.title: Going With The Flow / The Decoder
programme.desc: The Barbababies are bored, the rain is preventing them from playing outside. // Barbibul has created a clever decoder capable of translating the cries of animals.

programme.title: Shooting Star / Ball / Balloon
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy, Tia and Dad get stuck on a remote asteroid. // Tim, Kai and Tommy try to get their ball back from Mum's bedroom. // Tia's new balloon gets stuck in a tree, so Tim tries to get it down.

programme.title: Present / Movie / Vinny
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia can't decide on the best gift for Grandma. // Tim tries to make his own Captain DinoStar movie. // Tim fakes it to prove he's just as cool as Kai's cousin.

programme.title: Crabby Boots / Papi's Picnic Party
programme.desc: Dora and Boots meet Shelly, a hermit crab missing her shell, who uses one of Boots' boots. Dora travels across the beach in search of her old shell. // Papi is having a quesadilla picnic, but he forgot the ingredients! Dora sets off to deliver them.

programme.title: Big Big Boots / Backpack's Sticky Situation
programme.desc: Boots is too short to go on a ride, so he wishes to be bigger and becomes giant! Dora helps him go back to his normal size. // Backpack has something special for Dora, but she can't open! They travel to Abuela on Tallest Mountain so she can fix her.

programme.title: Miss Rabbit's Relaxation Class
programme.desc: Miss Rabbit persuades Mummy Pig to come along to her relaxation class to help her unwind.

programme.title: Parking Ticket
programme.desc: When Daddy Pig gets a parking ticket Peppa and George learn that adults have rules just like children.

programme.title: Father's Day
programme.desc: Peppa and George take it upon themselves to make this Father's Day the best Father's Day ever.

programme.title: Funny Music
programme.desc: Daddy Pig has a new synthesiser. Peppa, George and Mummy Pig have fun finding and sampling different sounds from around the house!

programme.title: Buttercups, Daisies and Dandelions
programme.desc: Cousin Chloe, Peppa and George are picking flowers, making daisy-chains and transforming George into a fearsome dandy-lion.

programme.title: The Marble Run
programme.desc: Peppa, George, Rebecca and Richard Rabbit have so much fun playing with their marble run. When Daddy Pig joins in, the marble run gets much bigger!

programme.title: Grandpa Pig's Metal Detector
programme.desc: When George loses his new toy robot's metal key, Grandpa Pig uses his metal detector to find it. They also find a lot of other things on the way!

programme.title: Meatball Mayhem
programme.desc: When Crusher accidentally knocks a bottle of "grow spice" onto a meatball, it grows to an enormous size and rolls away! It's up to Blaze and Pickle to transform into robots and stop the meatball before it wrecks the entire town!

programme.title: Pups' Adventures in Babysitting / Pups Save the Fireworks
programme.desc: Mayor Goodway calls on the Paw Patrol to rescue her twin niece and nephew from a tree, and then twin sit for the day! // Expecting the fireworks for Adventure Bay Day, Mayor Goodway receives a package of piglets after a mix-up!

programme.title: Pups Save the Spider Spies
programme.desc: The Turbot cousins try to spot a rare spider, but get stuck in its web. It's up to the PAW Patrol save the spider spies!

programme.title: The Crew Builds A Winter Wonderland / The Crew Builds A Giant Snow Squirrely Whirly
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew work together to transform Builder Cove's beach boardwalk into a bright, festive winter wonderland. // When a snow day gets in the way of Motor & Mix's Super Squirrely Whirly plans, Rubble & Crew do what they do best... build!

programme.title: The Crew Fixes The Lighthouse
programme.desc: Speed Meister shines his face in the sky with the lighthouse! But when a ship needs that light, the pups jump into action.

programme.title: Borrower Daisy / Can Do Croc
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile and Daisy try to figure out which of her friends borrowed her game and didn't return it. // A perfect "Step-Mother's" day for Maggie all depends on Daisy and Mr. Crocodile finding a can opener.

programme.title: Clock and Dance / Barbapileup
programme.desc: The barbababies prepare a show for Barbamama's birthday. While Barbalala finishes up, they go to the carnival where Barbabeau gets stuck in an attraction. // Three separate stories telescope into a big final bouquet in the middle of the courtyard.

programme.title: 圣山村迷局
programme.desc: 平静的圣山村发生了一系列神秘事件，原本该下葬的尸体突然复活，而且拔足狂跑。全村马上展开追查行动，但这时村中恶霸却意外死亡，村长也失踪。于是警察接手调查，但当谜底快要解开时，村干部却又有惊天大发现。到底谁是幕后真凶？

programme.title: 倒数回击
programme.desc: 天才拳击手徐佳阳为了替父亲还赌债在地下酒馆打黑拳时被举报，痛失奥运资格赛，陨落拳坛。十年后，铁血教练陈丽月决要助她实现父亲的遗愿，重回拳坛找回昔日的自己。当拳击的热血碰上责任时，曾经失落的拳击梦能否再度燃烧？

programme.title: 青木劫
programme.desc: 民国初年，富甲一方的康氏惨遭灭门，唯一的目击证人-家中的幼女-在亲眼目睹全家被杀后离奇失踪。几十年间，位于青木巷的废弃康宅充斥着灵异惊悚的气氛。随着真相逐渐揭露，这个恐怖的疑团交织着复仇与死亡的动机。

programme.title: 破坏之王
programme.desc: 外卖员何金银为让他的女神阿丽对他刮目相看，发奋习武，并学了奇怪的招式。胆小怕事的他一次头戴加菲猫面具拯救了阿丽，不料事后被空手道大师段水流领功。银为揭穿真相，最终在擂台使出绝招"无敌风火轮"击败段大师，并抱得美人归。

programme.title: 错爱迷踪
programme.desc: 跟朋友在酒吧喝酒的女孩邂逅恐怖小说家，两人一见钟情感情迅速升温。原来女孩已悄然落入惊天迷局，全因小说家的前女友是个毁容的女鬼，她借用人面还魂复仇，与前男友联手开启夺命惊吓。

programme.title: 少年叶问之危机时刻
programme.desc: 1917年，少年叶问初到香港求学。英文演讲比赛当天，学校发生一宗惊天绑架案，全校同学都被挟持。面对眼前的危机，叶问挺身而出，发现绑匪竟然是自己的师父和好兄弟。少年叶问在危机时刻可否打败绑匪，从而伸张正义？

programme.title: 关云长
programme.desc: 这是一场发生在三国动荡时期的史诗式之旅。曹操试图招揽关羽加入他的阵营，但关羽忠于他的结拜兄弟刘备，也是曹操的敌人。当关羽试图从曹操手上救出刘备的小妾时，迫于无奈要大开杀戒。最后他能否杀出重围？

programme.title: 摩登仙履奇缘
programme.desc: 陈七是职业惯匪，偷呃拐骗无所不为，但从不使用暴力；张曼珠是电视台新晋演员，收入微薄，生活拮据。一次偶然中，陈得到了一枚巨钻，欲找买家脱手，却遇杀手追杀，情急下将巨钻藏于某鞋店的一只高跟鞋内，后来，此鞋刚好被张买去参加舞会......

programme.title: 黑白潜行2
programme.desc: 在莱咖国政权交替之际，黑帮头目宋邦企图藉此洗白身份，欲坐上市长宝座。为了筹措庞大资金，他与官员勾结行贿，却仍面临严重的资金缺口。于是，宋邦的得力助手郑咤和打手苏万杀人越货、横行作恶，逐步帮助他巩固权力。正当宋邦自以为能坐享其成时，三人的关系却突然逆转...

programme.title: 倾城之恋
programme.desc: 本片由香港导演许鞍华执导，改编自著名小说家张爱玲的同名小说，是一个发生在日军入侵香港期间的爱情故事。一个内向的上海离婚女子和一个愤世嫉俗的马来西亚花花公子互相倾慕。但因时局动荡，两人多次被迫分开，最终能否有情人终成眷属?

programme.title: 霍家拳之精武英雄
programme.desc: 陈真在日本流学时，发现多名中国学生失踪，意外揭发黑龙会的阴谋。原来，黑龙会研发新药以增强日本军在战争中的体能，并捉拿中国学生做实验。于是，陈真誓要瓦解黑龙会，并将其实验密室捣毁。

programme.title: 男与女
programme.desc: 偷渡客孟思晨匿居于山边木屋区，沦为众男工具，期间结识非法拳师江远生，并发生雾水情缘。后来思晨下嫁中年木匠贵叔，生活虽安稳，心灵却空虚。意外再遇远生后，难免干柴烈火，未几更有孕...

programme.title: 无味神探
programme.desc: 故事根据真人实事改编，讲述香港督察刘镇海个性暴躁又好色，毒枭阿军欲杀他自保，但只令海失去味觉和嗅觉。妻子不忍见丈夫负伤累累因此尽释前嫌、尽心照顾。阿军得知海幷未身亡，胁持其妻作为谈判筹码。海为了救出妻子，只身一人与毒枭展开生死决战...

programme.title: 贼王之王
programme.desc: 两名私家侦探欲藉破一连环大劫案而声名大噪。岂料调查过程中竟一再被贼王使计愚弄，笑话连篇。及后更发现原来所有劫案均与日商宫本有关，到底谁才是真正的贼王之王？

programme.title: 秦明·生死语者
programme.desc: 被誉为"尸语者"的法医秦明常可在尸体身上解剖出重要的线索。在调查一宗谋杀案时，秦明在实习助手和刑警队长的协助下发现了尘封16年的雪山杀人案，同时亦揭发离奇谋杀案背后隐藏着的秘密。

programme.title: 马永贞
programme.desc: 从山东逃难至上海的马永贞，因救了势力人士谭四而受到赏识，又从黑帮头子杨双手上夺取了他在上海的第一个地盘，从此平步青云。杨双与巡捕房勾结，谋害谭四并派人伏杀马永贞...

programme.title: 回魂夜
programme.desc: 老妇神秘堕楼死亡，鬼魂于回魂夜当晚出现作祟。弄得一众大厦保安员不得安宁，并邀请了捉鬼大师Leo与女助手相助。Leo从老妇鬼魂得知，她是被儿子及媳妇所杀害，为了让老妇安息，Leo答应将夫妇二人绳之以法...

programme.title: 铁线功夫拳
programme.desc: 习武多年的梁坤为守护心爱之人本不愿再过问江湖之事，却因此导致心爱之人惨死，梁坤也就此明白江湖的真意。他最终在丐帮长老苏灿的帮助下重返江湖，力战群寇，成功为爱人报仇雪恨。

programme.title: 白发鬼
programme.desc: 年轻俊秀，生于名门望族的日籍华人林保，自幼失去父母，与大学好友川村感情深厚。二人都对美少女琉璃子心存爱慕，但川村自怜身世，不敢与林保争夺，林保顺利娶得琉璃子为妻。林保出国公干期间，川村和琉璃子耐不住寂寞，有了奸情。不久之后，林保竟在一次滑雪中意外身亡...

programme.title: 雪儿
programme.desc: 舞蹈教师雪儿年轻貌美，被富商戴家乐力追，但她却喜欢青年艺术家阿化，并与他同居。戴家乐心有不甘，设计让雪儿对他改观，更利诱阿化离开雪儿！

programme.title: 冰封侠之时空行者
programme.desc: 《冰封侠：时空行者》承接前作，四位明朝锦衣卫在现代香港苏醒。为修正历史，贺英独自踏上了寻找「时空金球」的凶险旅程，却不知自己正一步步堕入精心布下的致命陷阱。

programme.title: 十万火急
programme.desc: 这是关于香港消防员的英勇救火故事。勇敢的消防员无惧冲天大火，肩负救灾扶危的重任，甚至舍身救人。但当消防员脱下制服后，是否仍同样勇敢地面对自身的难题呢？

programme.title: 中华英雄
programme.desc: 1913年，华英雄惨遭灭门，愤然流亡美国。妻子洁瑜怀孕寻夫，二人异乡重逢。孰料龙凤胎出生当夜，中华楼遭敌纵火，洁瑜惨死、女婴被掳。十六年后，子华剑雄踏上寻父之路，华英雄则于自由女神像顶，与宿敌无敌展开生死决战。

programme.title: 柠檬可乐
programme.desc: 就读女校高中的婷婷，因排演《罗密欧与茱丽叶》而与邻校男生Jackson戏假情真，爱情就在排练时萌芽。这是婷婷的初恋，但Jaskson却是一个变幻莫测的爱情玩家...

programme.title: 除暴安良
programme.desc: 三名持枪劫匪抢劫了一批正在运送的新发行货币，刑警常勇奉命展开调查。随着线索逐渐浮现，常勇成功击毙一名劫匪。然而，其他两名劫匪不甘就此罢手，乘乱密谋抢劫金厂的黄金。常勇凭藉精密的部署，成功粉碎了他们的计划，将不法分子绳之以法。

programme.title: 逃学威龙三之龙过鸡年
programme.desc: 富商王百万被发现离奇死于酒店房间，由于周星星与他极为相似，星星再次接受任务，作卧底调查这宗谋杀案。王百万生前与妻子感情早已破裂，妻子因此成为头号嫌疑人。然而，在调查过程中，星星发现王百万的友人林大岳同样形迹可疑......

programme.title: 僵尸家族
programme.desc: 一群盗墓的考古学家意外发现一个保存完好的僵尸家族，计画将他们贩卖至黑市牟利。岂料在运送途中，不慎撕下封印僵尸的纸符，让沉睡的亡灵苏醒逃窜。然而，当地中医师林正英挺身而出，誓要将它们彻底剿灭。

programme.title: 窥情
programme.desc: 波子一夜用望远镜窥看家邻近四周时，揭发了一宗命案。但经警方调查村内居民，包括富商情妇Rita、邮差、纸店主老王及其妻子等人，揭开彼此间错综复杂的情欲关系之同时，还是不知谁是受害人，谁是凶手... 于是，波子决定用自己的方法继续调查...

programme.title: 最佳女婿
programme.desc: 新潮发型屋少东 Happy 哥与死党赖布甸、龙眼仔, 因抢走上海理发店板大松客人, 与他发生口角. 一夜, 三人胡涂地与松女儿阿英醉宿一宵, 之后英意外怀孕, 不知是谁才是经手人, 惟有待孩子出世后, 以血型辨别亲父, 怎料三人皆属同一血型...

programme.title: The Sound Of Money
programme.desc: Shawn finds a good luck charm in his son. Ken suffers a mechanical setback and Emily sends rookie diver Chase underwater.

programme.title: Winter's Fortune: Gold Moves
programme.desc: Tony Beets sets his sights on a $3.5-million monster dozer. Dave Turin hunts for a claim with his new Mad Max prospecting machine.

programme.title: We Might Die Today
programme.desc: In Ohio, a stolen van leads multiple agencies on an action-packed chase, but when the driver calls 911 they discover he's not alone in the vehicle.

programme.title: Border Control: Sweden (S2)
programme.desc: The security and customs services at the border of Sweden are on constant watch to stop illegal items from entering the country. It's their job to detect crime.

programme.title: Double Down
programme.desc: Despite the worst conditions in a decade, the miners hedge their bets as Shawn and Ken go head to head with their largest ships ever.

programme.title: Border Control: Sweden (S2)
programme.desc: The security and customs services at the border of Sweden are on constant watch to stop illegal items from entering the country. It's their job to detect crime.

programme.title: Brazil
programme.desc: Ed endures the bullet-ant ceremony, the most painful thing this side of child birth. Also facing 24 hours of agony are Brazilian boys who do this 20 times to become men.

programme.title: Party Bus
programme.desc: After a gunfight, Jeremy Parnell turns up dead. Detective Katie Roszkowski, leading her first homicide case, uncovers a party bus gone wrong.

programme.title: Border Control: Spain (S9)
programme.desc: At the borders of Spain, it's the job of the Security and Customs Services to detect threats from drugs, weapons, and suspected terrorists.

programme.title: Border Control: Spain (S9)
programme.desc: At the borders of Spain, it's the job of the Security and Customs Services to detect threats from drugs, weapons, and suspected terrorists.

programme.title: Storm Ravaged
programme.desc: Shawn channels his inner MacGyver to fix a stalled machine. Kris acts boldly. Vern must make a life or death decision.

programme.title: Border Control: Sweden (S2)
programme.desc: The security and customs services at the border of Sweden are on constant watch to stop illegal items from entering the country. It's their job to detect crime.

programme.title: Shaolin
programme.desc: For most people, Shaolin kung fu takes years to master -- Ed has just a few days to learn to control his Qi, or vital force, before fighting a martial arts master.

programme.title: Fab Four And A Big Score
programme.desc: A police officer's house is packed with Beatles records, fishing gear and guns. Sports jerseys have taken over a family home. Sales top $100,000!

programme.title: Fight For Your Life
programme.desc: Dustin Hurt mounts an emergency rescue mission on the deadly Tsirku River, and a fight threatens to end Carlos' time at Nugget Creek.

programme.title: The Weasel
programme.desc: Tony hunts down an insubordinate crew member. Rick gets his first gold from Lightning Creek. Kevin struggles to get his new Pyramid Cut running.

programme.title: Man Overboard
programme.desc: After enduring months of mechanical breakdown, sleepless grinds, and infighting, the fleet is starting to crack.

programme.title: The Final Battle
programme.desc: The younger generation is put to the test as the fleet races to finish a grueling opilio season.

programme.title: The Kingmaker Claim
programme.desc: Jared and crew race against time to move enough wood to water to win the Holy Grail of logging claims and secure Cypress Creek's legacy forever.

programme.title: Sharks Vs Nazis In Paradise
programme.desc: Just off Florida's coast, Josh Gates braves shark-infested waters in search of an American ship sunk by a Nazi U-boat during WWII.

programme.title: Matts Michigan Magic
programme.desc: In a modern-day treasure hunt, Matt Paxton and his team gamble on finding rare, potentially valuable items buried inside cluttered, filthy homes.

programme.title: Surprise Fortunes
programme.desc: While searching for better ground on Lightning Creek, Rick is rocked by surprising news. Parker gets greedy and expands his Sulphur claim.

programme.title: Love And War
programme.desc: For Dustin and his crew, exhaustion and lack of gold at The Wall pushes them to the boiling point. Dustin is forced to take drastic action.

programme.title: New Season, New Challenges
programme.desc: The stage is set for the start of another multi-million dollar South Australian abalone season.

programme.title: Sharks Vs Nazis In Paradise
programme.desc: Just off Florida's coast, Josh Gates braves shark-infested waters in search of an American ship sunk by a Nazi U-boat during WWII.

programme.title: Insiders (2026)
programme.desc: David Speers and the panel cover the week in politics including the PM's trip to Brunei and Malaysia to shore up Australia's fuel and fertiliser supply, the Middle East War, the Coalition's immigration policy and the Budget.

programme.title: Offsiders (2026)
programme.desc: More than just the action on the field, Offsiders tackles the week in sport from all angles - from business, politics, marketing, the fans, society, culture, history and the athletes' perspective. Presented by Abbey Gelmi.

programme.title: News Breakfast (2026)
programme.desc: Start your Monday with all the news you need. James Glenday and Emma Rebellato bring you the latest overnight news, interviews and the top stories this morning, plus Catherine Murphy with sport and Nate Byrne with weather.

programme.title: News Breakfast (2026)
programme.desc: As each day begins get the facts you need to stay informed. James Glenday and Emma Rebellato present the latest news, overnight developments and today's top stories, joined by Catherine Murphy, Nate Byrne and Lillian Rangiah.

programme.title: ABC News Mornings (2026)
programme.desc: Stay in the know with what's happening this morning. ABC News brings you up-to-the-minute news to fuel your daily conversations so you can stay connected and follow the discussion across the day. Presented by Gemma Veness.

programme.title: ABC News At Noon (2026)
programme.desc: The leading news at lunchtime. Kathryn Robinson brings you today's top stories and the latest news as it unfolds, with reporters in the community across Australia and around the world reporting on the issues that matter.

programme.title: Cartel Paradise - Fiji
programme.desc: Fiji is ground zero in the Pacific's drug crisis. Huge quantities of methamphetamine and cocaine are being trafficked through Fiji and on to Australia, fuelling a wave of addiction and corruption in the Fijian community.

programme.title: Portrait Artist Of The Year S1
programme.desc: In the Grand Final, three outstanding artists each have four hours to paint a portrait of adored comedy icon Denise Scott, each drawing on their unique approach to artmaking.

programme.title: Across the Regions: Hobart to Karratha
programme.desc: We see Women of Troy at Hobart's Ten Days on the Island festival; visit Burrup Peninsula's ancient petroglyphs with Perun Bonser; meet Sammy Hawker on the South Coast; and head to Hanging Rock with Nick Cave and Warren Ellis.

programme.title: Australia at Play
programme.desc: Sport and the arts are part of the culture of the new nation from the outset and say much about the character of Australians and their way of life.

programme.title: Alone Australia S3
programme.desc: In a battle against time, the survivalists hurry to establish shelters or catch food before their energy reserves run out.

programme.title: ABC News with Joe O'Brien (2026)
programme.desc: Joe O'Brien brings you a comprehensive summary of the day's events, with the latest breaking news, in depth coverage of the top stories, live crosses, interviews and explainers to bring you up to speed on what's going on.

programme.title: Fiat Malaniyom
programme.desc: We meet a chef turned farmer who grows specialty produce to share the taste of Thailand.

programme.title: ABC National News (2026)
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time for transparency and trust. ABC News brings you the day's top stories and latest news, with more reporters to tell you what's going on and why it matters. Presented by Joe O'Brien.

programme.title: Planet America (2026)
programme.desc: King Charles is scheduled to visit the US in late April to meet with President Trump, as relations between the US and UK PM Keir Starmer sour over Iran and the Strait of Hormuz. Chas and John guide you through the week.

programme.title: The Pacific (2026)
programme.desc: The murky underworld of Fiji's growing drug trade, how the Pacific might break free from its reliance on fuel amid a global crisis, plus extreme weather batters communities across PNG, Solomon Islands and the North Pacific.

programme.title: Solo Set: Tofaga Meke
programme.desc: Pacific Break returns in 2025 with a special concert in Samoa.

programme.title: The World (2026)

programme.title: 中年好声音4
programme.desc: 《中年好声音4》为35岁以上热爱歌唱的人士提供舞台，鼓励他们勇敢追梦。本季扩大全球招募，覆盖粤港澳大湾区、北美、新加坡、马来西亚、澳洲等地，吸引更多来自不同背景的中年参赛者以歌声讲述自己的故事。

programme.title: 东张西望
programme.desc: 《东张西望》星期一至日，紧贴追踪社会大事、趣闻逸事，并报导娱乐圈最新动态、艺人消息，以及剧集宣传和花絮。「今日突发」环节为大家追踪即日热门新闻；专题环节，深入探讨大众关心的时事、社会及民生问题，并访问相关的专家。

programme.title: 一周星星
programme.desc: 访谈节目《一周星星》，每集邀请星级艺人、界别名人，与区永权、许文轩、王镇泉等娱乐主播，分享新近工作企划，谈论电影、电视、演唱会相关的特别话题，尤其是网民与圈中朋友关心热议的人和事！

programme.title: 流行经典50年
programme.desc: 中外乐坛历年来诞生无数金曲，不论什么年代的作品，皆各有知音人。《流行经典50年》邀请原唱人或实力歌手，再次演绎这些流行一时，兼且跨越多代的经典，为乐迷带来高质素的音乐享受。

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递
programme.desc: 熊树根是小型运输公司东主，与次女若水、三女心如以及长女的儿子金城安同住旧楼，惟心如与若水经常争吵，教树根哭笑不得。树根无视众人反对，力邀不修边幅的亲弟树仁搬来同住，怎料树仁竟无意间招惹了鬼魂龙璟风，令熊家出现翻天覆地的转变！

programme.title: 兄弟帮
programme.desc: 《兄弟帮》是由一班「好兄弟」林盛斌、梁竞徽、王梓轩、范振锋及陈国峰主持的年青人清谈节目，每集邀请歌手、艺人或不同界别人士作嘉宾，进行轻松访谈，带来时下社会热话、流行文化、潮流玩意等多元化内容。

programme.title: 流行都市
programme.desc: 《流行都市》为观众介绍时令产品、健康养生、健体运动、护肤化妆、时尚服饰、婴幼儿护理、育儿知识、城中美食、饲养宠物等潮流资讯，内容包罗万有！

programme.title: 爱．回家之开心速递

programme.title: 吴邪私家笔记
programme.desc: 吴邪解读帛书地图，与三叔组队探古墓，遇怪兽、铜鱼揭三叔往事，神秘女子阿宁现身后三叔失踪，新冒险展开。

programme.title: 兄弟帮

programme.title: 春闺梦里人
programme.desc: 季曼失忆后阴差阳错成宁钰轩夫人，凭智慧与经商逆转命运，并助夫君平乱获皇帝封赏。二人联手铲除恶势力与阴谋，历经坠崖分离与重逢，最终共度风雨终成眷属。

programme.title: 快乐长门人
programme.desc: 节目请来专业医生及中医，详细探讨长者要注意的疾病及都市病，提供预防及治疗的方法。营养师讲解饮食知识，从饮食中学习养生之道。

programme.title: 新闻掏宝
programme.desc: 《新闻掏宝》带大家在宝库「掏」新闻宝藏，除了昔日特辑、直播和系列报道，还有从未曝光的珍贵片段，观众有机会重温李小龙出殡、宝生银行劫案、四人帮审讯、英女王访港、的士罢驶、中英签订联合声明、戴卓尔夫人专访等。

programme.title: Holistic Way及京都念慈庵呈献: 正义女神
programme.desc: 高等法院法官言惠知调查一宗14岁少年高成彬涉嫌导致6岁男童坠亡案件时，发现其多次犯罪却因年龄未被追责。她主动降职至少年法庭裁判官通过引导教育帮助问题少年。

programme.title: 天才冲冲冲
programme.desc: 「寓教于乐」的大型综艺节目, 节目单元不仅推陈出新, 在生活中更能与三五好友, 一同尝试节目中的各项游戏, 亲身体验节目中的各项乐趣。

programme.title: 詹姆士出走料理
programme.desc: 为了寻找记忆中的美味料理，詹姆士将带领大家探索市场，品尝在地美味、寻访料理达人。并在节目中展现特殊食材的处理方式、尝试新的酱料或是新的料理作法，制作创意料理，最后在节目片尾时作出一道『詹姆士创意料理』。

programme.title: 以爱为营
programme.desc: 财经记者郑书意（白鹿饰）为拿下头版几经努力争取和有名的年轻霸道总裁时宴（王鶴棣饰）进行采访，两人互相留下了深刻印象。最终阴差阳错的爱情慢慢升温。

programme.title: 非诚勿扰 12
programme.desc: 非诚勿扰是一档适应现代生活节奏的大型婚恋交友节目, 在广大单身男女提供了一个公开的婚恋交友平台的同时, 也迎来了新的当红男星作为新一任的非诚合伙人。

programme.title: 市井豪门
programme.desc: 一条街隔开两个世界。一边是努力生活有苦也有笑的市场人生，一边是勾心斗角有钱却战战兢兢的豪门日子。

programme.title: 全城风暴
programme.desc: 科研人员张子聪与团队共同研发的"风控"系统，暗藏的隐患导致了自然灾害的发生。一场始料未及的台风、雷电、地震等自然灾害的连锁反应，让这座城市瞬间崩塌。父亲张英勇拼死一搏也要守护儿子张子聪和女儿张子然。这场猝不及防的台风让一切尽于灰烬，但爱得以重生。

programme.title: 长风渡
programme.desc: 自小受尽磨砺的徉州城布商之女柳玉茹与当地著名纨绔顾九思阴差阳错结为夫妻, 性格迥异的两人在错位婚姻里, 从相互抵触到相互扶持, 相互治愈。

programme.title: 把关者们
programme.desc: 故事围绕版权及商标调查科高级监督海锋（袁伟豪饰）、总贸易管制主任关佩欣（黄智雯饰）、海关毒品调查课监督温芷祺（王敏奕饰）与一众海关菁英追究原子弹、白粉等海关风波。

programme.title: 把关者们

programme.title: 非诚勿扰 12

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW
programme.desc: Antoine Semenyo's journey to the Premier League has been anything but straightforward. Starting his career at Bristol City, he had loan spells at Bath City, Newport County and Sunderland. Then, in 2023, the Ghanaian winger moved to Bournemouth and has never looked back. With 30 goals in four seasons on the South Coast, Semenyo established himself as one of the brightest talents in the Premier League and, this season, made the move to Manchester City.

programme.title: PL STORIES
programme.desc: We step inside the world of Tijjani Reijnders, joining him at home with his family in Manchester as he reflects on his remarkable rise to the top of the game. programme.desc: Meet real life hired killers operating in organised networks in the Philippines, where even cops and politicians are known to have been targeted.

programme.desc: Cambodia's under-developed social infrastructure has created an infamous breeding ground for child prostitution and sex tourism.

programme.title: Pocket Knife Killer Or Vulnerable Vacationer?
programme.desc: A day out on the river with friends ends in a deadly encounter when a man stabs five people with a pocket knife, following a terrifying confrontation.

programme.title: Adam Matos
programme.desc: When an entire family is found in a decaying pile of bodies by the side of a Florida road, the hunt is on to find what police fear might be two more victims, Adam Matos and his four-year-old autistic son.

programme.title: The Girl Next Door
programme.desc: The community of Macon, GA, is gripped in a wave of terror when a beautiful law student disappears from her apartment complex. Nobody knows where she could be or what could have happened.

programme.title: A World Of Hurt
programme.desc: In the sunny cities of Daytona and Cocoa, ATF Special Agent Perala is reminded of the importance of listening to your gut. His life is threatened when suspects turn the tables on him.

programme.title: The Bad Guy Did It
programme.desc: May 13, 2020, Reno, Nevada. Officers from the Reno Police Department are dispatched to the La Quinta Inn after several motel guests report hearing gunshots in the middle of the night.

programme.title: Ryan Poster
programme.desc: After a woman calls 911 to report shooting her boyfriend in self-defence, investigators uncover a pristine crime scene and disturbing behaviour that cast doubt on her story.

programme.title: Game Over
programme.desc: Police quickly identify a suspect in the murder of a local college professor, but a bombshell piece of technology stolen from the crime scene then points them in a completely different direction.

programme.title: Peace Love And Murder In Marin
programme.desc: A brutal double murder shocks Northern California's peace-loving and laid-back Marin County. With residents reeling, police chase an elusive killer through three counties.

programme.title: Assassins
programme.desc: Meet real life hired killers operating in organised networks in the Philippines, where even cops and politicians are known to have been targeted.

programme.title: Paedophiles

programme.title: Pocket Knife Killer Or Vulnerable Vacationer?
programme.desc: A day out on the river with friends ends in a deadly encounter when a man stabs five people with a pocket knife, following a terrifying confrontation.

programme.title: CI Asia: The "tooth 16" Sex Fiend
programme.desc: A criminal poses as a patient in the dental clinics of Manila and then robs and rapes their staff. Amidst an attack, he reveals he can speak the local dialect, leaving a clue for the police.

programme.title: Eva Hamby
programme.desc: Eva Hamby sits down for a polygraph test with a former FBI agent in an effort to clear her name. Hamby was convicted of second-degree murder for the stabbing death of her boyfriend.

programme.title: Emilia Carr
programme.desc: In 2009, Emilia Carr and her boyfriend Joshua Fulgham were convicted for the first-degree murder and kidnapping of Heather Strong, and Emilia alone was sentenced to death.

programme.title: Shattered Families
programme.desc: Heartbreaking accounts of families torn apart by crime. Ashley Wallace, who was almost killed by her own mother, Jenny Carrieri, whose search for her sister's murderer consumed her life.

programme.title: Thou Shalt Not Kill
programme.desc: When a Christian ranch hand, Dan Lavigne, 52, is shot dead on his porch in Montana, 2002, deputies find no shortage of suspects.

programme.title: Destiny (Part B)
programme.desc: Destiny refuses to leave the house and says she "basically checked out of life". The extremely hoarded house has come to the attention of the homeowners, and they want the house cleaned up.

programme.title: Anthony Todt
programme.desc: After the brutal murder of a mom, her children, and the family dog rocks a picture-perfect Orlando suburb-all signs point to the dad, Tony Todt.

programme.title: Staircase Shooter Or Defensive Dad?
programme.desc: An angry confrontation leads to a 31-year-old father facing life behind bars after shooting his ex-girlfriend's boyfriend in the leg. He insists he was defending his ex and their child from an intruder.

programme.desc: After police respond to a shooting in Chicago, a man is arrested and charged. He claims that he was attacked with a hammer before reaching for his weapon.

programme.title: CI Asia: Marked By A Rapist
programme.desc: A man rapes all the females inside an establishment at gunpoint. He remains at large until he leaves his fingerprints on a bubble tea cup at a shop, which helps the police investigate the case.

programme.title: I Promise It Was Him
programme.desc: A woman calls 911 with a story of being abducted and forced into the trunk of her car by a masked assailant who fatally shoots her girlfriend.

programme.title: Celebrity Under Oath
programme.desc: This special brings viewers inside the courtroom as celebrities are forced to sit in the hot seat and provide on-camera testimony.

programme.title: Takeout Drugs
programme.desc: A man leads police on a high-speed chase in a stolen mail truck. A restaurant owner is arrested after hiding drugs in a takeout box. A pizza delivery guy helps the cops arrest a thief; and more.

programme.title: Ride Or Die
programme.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country: an innocent woman insists on going to jail with her arrested BFF; a thief absconds with a giant life-size stick figure; and more!

programme.title: Birds And Bricks
programme.desc: Undercover agent Jerry Speziale's career shifts after a bullet; Agent Ed Newcomer probes hawk killings in California.

programme.title: Peace Love And Murder In Marin
programme.desc: A brutal double murder shocks Northern California's peace-loving and laid-back Marin County. With residents reeling, police chase an elusive killer through three counties.

programme.title: Kids Who Kill - Alyssa Bustamante
programme.desc: Troubled teen Alyssa Bustamante was a self-styled 'bad girl' who said she wanted to know how it felt to kill. She gave in to this curiosity and murdered her nine-year-old neighbour Elizabeth Olten.

programme.title: A Deadly Premonition
programme.desc: When Linda Slaten is brutally strangled in her Lakeland, FL, home, a web of suspects emerges. The case takes a dramatic turn when a DNA hit exposes the sinister underbelly of this peaceful community.

programme.title: Ya Got The Wrong Guy
programme.desc: One wrong move could get anyone booked in; like a son who landed himself in jail after his dad rear-ended a car, or a gearhead who gets spotted by a helicopter after allegedly doing a burnout.

programme.title: 天才冲冲冲
programme.desc: 「寓教于乐」的大型综艺节目, 节目单元不仅推陈出新, 在生活中更能与三五好友, 一同尝试节目中的各项游戏, 亲身体验节目中的各项乐趣。

programme.title: 詹姆士出走料理
programme.desc: 为了寻找记忆中的美味料理，詹姆士将带领大家探索市场，品尝在地美味、寻访料理达人。并在节目中展现特殊食材的处理方式、尝试新的酱料或是新的料理作法，制作创意料理，最后在节目片尾时作出一道『詹姆士创意料理』。

programme.title: 以爱为营
programme.desc: 财经记者郑书意（白鹿饰）为拿下头版几经努力争取和有名的年轻霸道总裁时宴（王鶴棣饰）进行采访，两人互相留下了深刻印象。最终阴差阳错的爱情慢慢升温。

programme.title: 非诚勿扰 12
programme.desc: 非诚勿扰是一档适应现代生活节奏的大型婚恋交友节目, 在广大单身男女提供了一个公开的婚恋交友平台的同时, 也迎来了新的当红男星作为新一任的非诚合伙人。

programme.title: 市井豪门
programme.desc: 一条街隔开两个世界。一边是努力生活有苦也有笑的市场人生，一边是勾心斗角有钱却战战兢兢的豪门日子。

programme.title: 全城风暴
programme.desc: 科研人员张子聪与团队共同研发的"风控"系统，暗藏的隐患导致了自然灾害的发生。一场始料未及的台风、雷电、地震等自然灾害的连锁反应，让这座城市瞬间崩塌。父亲张英勇拼死一搏也要守护儿子张子聪和女儿张子然。这场猝不及防的台风让一切尽于灰烬，但爱得以重生。

programme.title: 长风渡
programme.desc: 自小受尽磨砺的徉州城布商之女柳玉茹与当地著名纨绔顾九思阴差阳错结为夫妻, 性格迥异的两人在错位婚姻里, 从相互抵触到相互扶持, 相互治愈。

programme.title: 把关者们
programme.desc: 故事围绕版权及商标调查科高级监督海锋（袁伟豪饰）、总贸易管制主任关佩欣（黄智雯饰）、海关毒品调查课监督温芷祺（王敏奕饰）与一众海关菁英追究原子弹、白粉等海关风波。

programme.title: A Chance on Love
programme.desc: A case of mistaken identity results in a wolf being changed to a bird.

programme.title: Death on the Nile (Part 1)
programme.desc: A wealthy British heiress honeymooning on a Nile cruise ship is stalked by a former friend, whose boyfriend she had stolen before making him her new husband.

programme.title: The Test
programme.desc: Olivia Walton must choose between her family and a career when she is offered a remarkable business opportunity.

programme.title: Branded
programme.desc: When Benson and Stabler investigate a brutal attack on an unassuming, upstanding father, they find he's also been branded on his chest with a wire coat hanger.

programme.title: Bundi
programme.desc: From stunning palaces to ornate stepwells, Asmita finds herself soaking in the romance of Bundi, a charming 14th century town in Rajasthan.

programme.title: Luxor
programme.desc: Seep visits Luxor, where she finds herself awestruck by the grand monuments that have survived from Thebes, the capital of ancient Egypt.

programme.title: Aberdeen
programme.desc: At the Highland Games in Perth, Robbie is faced with one of the most important rites of passage for a true Highlander: the caber toss.

programme.title: Chilamate
programme.desc: In the heart of Costa Rica's countryside, Genevieve embarks on a journey of cultural immersion in Chilamate.

programme.title: New Mexico
programme.desc: As Genevieve crosses into New Mexico on Route 66, what started as a classic road trip begins to turn into a journey to understanding her roots.

programme.title: Nagaland
programme.desc: Kohima introduces Charlie to tribal traditions where food begins in the forests, the fields, and a bond with the earth carried through generations.

programme.title: Mines Wellness, Malaysia
programme.desc: Jamie Srubis tries many rejuvenating spa treatments belonging to Ayurveda and Traditional Chinese Medicine, at Mines Wellness Resort in Malaysia.

programme.title: Alexandria
programme.desc: Alexandria, in Egypt, is a city that has reinvented itself frequently over the centuries, but hasn’t forgotten its roots.

programme.title: Aberdeenshire
programme.desc: Nestled in the craggy embrace of Aberdeenshire's hills, Robbie stumbles upon the Scotland less bragged about.

programme.title: Rincón de la Vieja
programme.desc: Costa Rica is home to nearly 30 national parks, and Genevieve sets out to explore one of them, Rincón de la Vieja.

programme.title: Northern Arizona
programme.desc: As Genevieve’s epic road trip leads her to Arizona’s raw, untamed terrain, the state begins to reveal its surreal natural wonders to her.

programme.title: Gangtok
programme.desc: Charlie reaches Gangtok and discovers a cuisine shaped by neighbours yet uniquely Sikkimese-soulful, resourceful, and full of mountain spirit.

programme.title: Sarovar Premier, Kerala
programme.desc: Jamie Srubis tries out basic Ayurvedic spa treatments such as the Four-Hands Synchronous Massage at the Vasundhara Sarovar Premiere Resort in Kerala.

programme.title: Paro
programme.desc: Radhika Bangia visits the famous monasteries of Paro, and learns the history and legends associated with them.

programme.title: Inverness
programme.desc: In the enchanting landscapes of Inverness, Robbie's journey takes a whimsical turn: from eccentric to downright magical.

programme.title: Guanacaste
programme.desc: Genevieve is drawn to Costa Rica's stunning Guanacaste region by its promise of thrilling water adventures.

programme.title: Arizona
programme.desc: The geological attractions of Arizona make Genevieve want to linger on a bit more in the state and veer off Route 66.

programme.title: Bhuj
programme.desc: In Bhuj, Charlie discovers how a harsh salt desert inspires food that’s vibrant, creative, and unexpectedly warm in spirit.

programme.title: Kumarakom, Kerala

programme.title: Thimpu

programme.title: Isle Of Skye

programme.title: Puntarenas

programme.title: California

programme.title: Anaimalai

programme.title: Phobjikha
programme.desc: Radhika Bangia visits Bumthang, the religious heart of Bhutan, where she explores the sacred sites and the legends surrounding them.

programme.title: Goa, India

programme.title: Oman 5 Must See Attractions
programme.desc: Here is a list of Oman’s must-see attractions, each of which unveils a unique facet of this Middle Eastern gem.

programme.title: 综艺大热门24
programme.desc: 由幽默风趣的吴宗宪、陈汉典、黃路梓茵联手主持带您闹翻天！最强综艺节目保证娱乐性十足，让你笑声不断，千万别错过。

programme.title: 幸福来了
programme.desc: 高家兄弟因为价值观截然不同，不但成就高低立判，连教育出来的子女，个性和品格也大相径庭。上一代有上一代的恩怨情报，下一代有下一代的追求展望；在错综复杂的人生大道上，每个人都汲汲营营，寻找着属于自己的幸福课题。

programme.title: 多情城市
programme.desc: 以1960至1970年代九份为背景，述说三个拜把兄弟如何赤手空拳打天下，藉由上一代的爱情故事串连两代之间共同的情感与记忆，深度探索两代之间的价值观差异。

programme.title: 市井豪门
programme.desc: 一条街隔开两个世界。一边是努力生活有苦也有笑的市场人生，一边是勾心斗角有钱却战战兢兢的豪门日子。

programme.title: 幸福来了
programme.desc: 高家兄弟因为价值观截然不同，不但成就高低立判，连教育出来的子女，个性和品格也大相径庭。上一代有上一代的恩怨情报，下一代有下一代的追求展望；在错综复杂的人生大道上，每个人都汲汲营营，寻找着属于自己的幸福课题。
